title: Supply Chain Operator E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a high-performance Supply Chain Operator who takes full ownership of inventory flow and replenishment.

We are not looking for someone who follows processes.

We are looking for someone who ensures products stay in stock and operations run smoothly.

You will be responsible for managing inventory across our main warehouse, FBA and LVB.

 

Your responsibility

• You own inventory availability across all channels 

• You ensure products are in stock at the right place at the right time 

• You act before stock-outs happen 

• You manage supply chain as a performance system, not as tasks 

 

What you will do

Daily operations

• Monitor stock levels across warehouse, FBA and LVB 

• Track incoming shipments and delays 

• Maintain clear visibility of inventory at all times 

Replenishment & planning

• Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB 

• Prioritize fast restocking of bestsellers 

• Balance stock between channels 

FBA shipments

• Create and manage FBA shipments (box & pallet level) 

• Book and manage Amazon Freight shipments 

• Ensure smooth inbound flow 

Coordination

• Work with warehouse and carriers 

• Ensure shipments are executed correctly 

• Fix issues fast when something goes wrong 

Inventory control

• Maintain accurate tracking in Airtable / sheets 

• Allocate stock across shipments and containers 

• Keep inbound and stock data clean and reliable 

 

Scope of the role

This role focuses on execution and control of inventory flow within Europe (FBA, LVB, warehouse).

It does not include:

• Supplier communication in China 

• Procurement / purchasing 

• Long-term demand forecasting 

These are handled in a separate role.

 

What we expect

• You are proactive and fast 

• You think in stock and flow, not tasks 

• You take ownership of problems 

• You don’t wait — you act 

 

Weekly output

• Which SKUs are at risk of going out of stock 

• What shipments are delayed or at risk 

• What actions are taken to fix this 

• Clear plan for next week 

 

Important

If a product goes out of stock, you take ownership.

title: Senior Demand & Inventory Planner
description:
We are looking for a high-performance operator to own forecasting, inventory planning and cash efficiency as we scale towards €100M+.



This is not a reporting role.

This is not a support role.

You will take ownership of our forecasting and inventory planning system and ensure it actually drives decisions.

 

Your responsibility

• You own demand forecasting across all channels (Amazon, Bol, etc.) 

• You d
 how much we buy, when we buy and where we allocate stock 

• You ensure we never run out of stock on winning products 

• You prevent overstock and dead inventory 

• You optimize working capital as we scale 

You are responsible for turning data into clear decisions.

 

What you will do

Forecasting (core)

• Maintain and improve SKU-level forecasts 

• Use historical data, trends and growth signals 

• Adjust forecasts based on real performance 



Inventory & purchasing decisions

• Translate forecasts into purchase plans 

• D
 order quantities and timing 

• Balance risk between stock-outs and overstock 

Cash & scaling

• Manage inventory vs cash position 

• Support scaling decisions with data 

• Keep inventory healthy while growing 



System & structure

• Work within our existing Airtable-based system 

• Improve structure, logic and reliability 

• Ensure the system is used for decision-making 



Supplier alignment

• Align planning with supplier lead times 

• Anticipate delays and adjust proactively 

 

What we expect

• 3–7+ years experience in forecasting / inventory planning 

• Strong analytical mindset 

• Experience in e-commerce or Amazon is a big plus 

• Able to work with data and translate it into decisions 

• Structured and detail-oriented 

• Ownership mindset 



You don’t just build models.

You use them to make decisions.

 

This is NOT for you if:

• You only build dashboards 

• You wait for instructions 

• You avoid making decisions 

• You need perfect data before acting 

 

Weekly output

• Forecast vs actual 

• Stock coverage per SKU 

• Risk overview (stock-outs / overstock) 

• Purchase plan and cash impact 

• Clear actions 

 

What makes this role different

• Direct impact on revenue and cash 

• Work on a system that is already in place and improve it 

• Focus on decisions, not just data 

• Key role in scaling the business 

 

Important

If we run out of stock or overstock heavily, you take ownership.

 

Application

To apply, send a short video (1–2 minutes) explaining:

1. How you approach forecasting in a growing business 

2. A situation where your planning improved results

title: AI Automation Developer
description:
About Us

We're a fast-moving cosmetics brand named Faccelove that uses AI to automate as much of our operations as possible — from creative production to internal workflows to customer-facing systems. We don't just use AI tools; we build custom AI-powered systems that run autonomously. We're looking for a developer who can become our go-to person for building these systems across the business.



What You'll Work On: 

This isn't a single project — it's an ongoing role building AI-powered automation across different areas of the business. Examples of what we need built:

- Autonomous creative pipelines that generate complete ads (visuals, video, copy, editing) from a single brief (Most urgent)

- Internal workflow automation — connecting tools, databases, and AI models to eliminate manual work

- AI agents that handle repetitive business processes end-to-end without human intervention

- Custom integrations between third-party AI services (image generation, video generation, LLMs) and our internal systems

- Data pipelines, dashboards, and reporting tools powered by AI analysis

- Customer-facing AI features — chatbots, personalized content, intelligent recommendations



New projects come up regularly. You'll need to be someone who can take a business problem, figure out the best way to solve it with AI and automation, and build it.



What We're Looking For

Must-have:

- Experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar)

- Strong Python and/or TypeScript — production-grade, not just prototypes

- Experience with LLM APIs: tool use, function calling, structured outputs, prompt engineering

- Ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple APIs into automated pipelines

- Full-stack capability — you can build both the backend logic and a functional frontend when needed

- Self-starter mindset — you take a problem, propose a solution, and build it without hand-holding



Nice-to-have:

- Experience with generative media APIs (image gen, video gen, AI editing tools)

- DevOps skills (Docker, CI/CD, cloud deployment)

- Database design and management (PostgreSQL, Supabase, vector databases)

- Experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or custom LLM tool integrations

- Background in n8n, Make, or other automation platforms (we prefer custom-built, but it helps to know the landscape)





Tech We Use

Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST APIs, various generative AI services



What Makes This Role Different

This isn't a one-off gig. We want someone who grows with us and becomes the person who knows our systems inside and out. You'll have real ownership over what you build, input on what we should build next, and the freedom to propose solutions we haven't thought of yet.



To Apply

Tell us:

1. What's the most interesting AI automation you've built? (link or description)

2. What's your availability and preferred working arrangement?

3. Your expected hourly/monthly salary

mber, making outbound calls every day.

- Ensure proper folder management and that all necessary documents are correctly stored in project folders.

- Assist in client contract processing by coordinating with sales, engineering, and finance teams, helping with contract drafting, payment reminders, and maintaining meeting records.

- Understand construction project processes, including phases, timelines, and deliverables, to help ensure smooth contract and project flow.

- Perform other tasks as needed to support the operations of the design team.



What We’re Looking For

- Proven experience in a project coordination, operations, or administrative role, preferably in a design-related environment.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).

title: Owner Relations Property Manager
description:
Navigate Stays is seeking a dedicated Owner Property Manager to serve as the primary point of contact for property owners. This role is responsible for conducting owner phone calls, managing owner relationships, tracking and resolving owner-reported issues, and ensuring exceptional communication and service delivery.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Owner Communication & Relationship Management



Conduct scheduled and ad-hoc phone calls with property owners

Serve as primary point of contact for owner inquiries, concerns, and feedback

Build and maintain strong, trust-based relationships with property owners

Proactively update owners on property performance, bookings, and issues

Handle owner concerns with professionalism, empathy, and urgency



2. Issue Tracking & Resolution



Track all owner-reported issues in the property management system

Document issues thoroughly with details, timelines, and priority levels

Coordinate with internal teams (maintenance, cleaning, guest services) to resolve issues

Follow up with owners to ensure issues are resolved to their satisfaction

Escalate complex or urgent issues to leadership as needed



3. Owner Support & Service



Answer owner questions about bookings, property performance, operations

Address billing inquiries and coordinate with accounting team

Educate owners on Navigate Stays processes, policies, and best practices

Gather owner feedback and identify opportunities for service improvement



4. Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of all owner communications and issues

Update property management system with owner preferences, notes, and issue status

Generate reports on owner satisfaction, common issues, and resolution times

Participate in tea
etings to share owner insights and trends





REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS:

? Excellent verbal and written communication skills

? Strong customer service orientation with focus on relationship building

? Ability to handle difficult conversations with professionalism and empathy

? Highly organized with strong attention to detail

? Ability to manage multiple priorities and follow up consistently

? Proficiency with property management software, or willingness to learn

? Problem-solving mindset and ability to work independently

? Professional phone presence and active listening skills



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:



Experience in property management, hospitality, or customer success

Familiarity with vacation rental operations and owner expectations

Experience using Guesty, EzAide, or similar property management platforms

Background in account management or client relations





KEY COMPETENCIES:

Communication Excellence

Ability to communicate clearly, professionally, and empathetically with property owners across various situations—from routine updates to sensitive issue resolution.

Relationship Management

Skilled at building trust and rapport with owners, understanding their needs and concerns, and maintaining positive long-term relationships.

Issue Resolution

Proactive approach to identifying, tracking, and resolving owner issues efficiently while keeping all parties informed throughout the process.

Organizational Skills

Ability to manage multiple owner accounts, track numerous issues simultaneously, and maintain detailed documentation without losing track of priorities.

Empathy & Patience

Understands that property owners have significant financial investment in their properties and can navigate emotional conversations with care and professionalism.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

? Owners feel heard, valued, and confident in Navigate Stays' management

? Owner-reported issues are tracked, resolved promptly, and followed up on consistently

? Owner satisfaction scores and retention rates improve over time

? Clear documentation allows anyone on the team to understand owner history

? Owners proactively refer new property owners to Navigate Stays



WORK ENVIRONMENT:



Must be available for scheduled owner calls during business hours

Collaborative team environment with regular check-ins and support

Access to property management software, CRM tools, and communication platforms





HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role to:

title: AI UGC Video Creative Strategist (Meta Ads – E-commerce)
description:
We're looking for a highly experienced AI UGC Creative Strategist who can create and guide ads that scale profitably on Meta.



This is NOT basic editing.

This is NOT organic content.



We run high-spend, direct response campaigns that generate real revenue.



You will be responsible for:



Creating and producing AI UGC style ads (realistic, high-converting)

Developing angles, hooks, and scripts

Turning ideas into ads that perform at scale

Editing and refining videos when needed

Creating realistic scenarios (e.g. store owner showing products, storytelling style ads)



You must already understand how to:



Create realistic AI UGC videos

Use tools like VEO3, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, and similar AI video/voice tools

Apply lip sync, voiceovers, and editing to make ads feel real and natural



We are currently doing $300K–$500K/month in revenue, so there is a lot of volume and testing.



We are NOT looking to train someone. You must already be operating at a high level.

We need someone who can plug in immediately and perform.



Compensation



We offer a 2000$ monthly salary + high performance bonuses.



This means:



You earn bonuses on winning creatives

This can be:

Fixed bonus per winning ad

Or a % of ad spend



Top performers in our team earn more than standard fixed salary roles because of this structure.



Requirements

Proven experience with AI UGC ad creation for Meta ads

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.)

Experience with lip sync, voiceovers, and realistic AI avatars

Ability to create ads that feel authentic and not “AI-generated”

Strong understanding of hooks, angles, and direct response marketing

Experience working with e-commerce brands (Shopify, DTC)

Ability to work fast and produce consistently





Big Plus



Experience creating storefront / owner-style ads

Experience with performance marketing teams

Understanding of what makes ads scale (not just look good)

Experience with high-volume creative production





Do NOT Apply If:



You only have basic video editing experience

You have no experience with AI UGC tools

You need training or guidance to get started

You cannot show real examples of ads you created





To Apply



Send a message with:

2–3 examples of AI UGC ads you created (with results if possible)

Tools you use (VEO3, Higgsfield, HeyGen, Synthesia, ElevenLabs, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

Your expected monthly salary in USD



Important: Include the word “SCALE” in your application so we know you read everything.



No examples = no response.

title: Operations Lead - Marketing & Conversion Strategy

OVERVIEW

We're looking for an Operations Lead to own and scale the revenue engine across our creator portfolio.

title: Have a Business — or Want to Start One? Let’s Build It (Shark Tank Style)
description:
I’m looking for serious, driven individuals — especially based in the Philippines or working online — who either:



Already have a business

OR

Have a strong idea and want to build one

This is not a job. This is an opportunity to build something real together.



 What I Want From You

Think Shark Tank style — clear, honest, and to the point.

1. Tell me about YOU

, cold outreach, referrals, ads, etc.)

Final Note

Send your idea like you’re pitching for real money.

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)

Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.

 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

 handle

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.

title: AI Agent Developer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a developer who lives at the intersection of AI and automation. You'll design and build fully autonomous creative pipelines that take a single prompt and produce complete, polished advertisements — visuals, video, copy, and editing — with no manual intervention and other sorts of Ai agents that helps our beauty brand Faccelove function more efficiently. 



You'll work with Claude Code as the orchestration backbone, integrating third-party generative AI services (NanoBanana for image generation, Higgsfield for AI video, and others) into seamless, production-grade workflows. The end goal: a system where a human provides a brief and gets back a finished creative asset.



What You'll Build

- Autonomous AI agent pipelines using Claude Code that chain together multiple generative AI services end-to-end

- API integrations with image generation (NanoBanana), video generation (Higgsfield), and editing/post-production tools

- Prompt engineering systems that translate high-level creative briefs into structured, multi-step agent workflows

- Quality control and feedback loops — automated checks that evaluate outputs and retry/refine when needed

- Robust error handling, state management, and logging for complex multi-API orchestration





Requirements (Must-Have)

- Hands-on experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar frameworks)

- Strong proficiency in Python and/or TypeScript — you write clean, production-grade code, not just scripts

- Experience with LLM APIs: function calling / tool use, structured outputs, prompt chaining, and multi-turn orchestration

- Proven ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple third-party APIs in a single automated pipeline

- Solid understanding of async programming, error handling, retry logic, and building resilient systems



Nice-to-Have

- Familiarity with generative media APIs — image generation, video generation, or AI-driven editing tools

- Experience with creative production workflows (advertising, content creation, or media post-production)

- Background in MCP (Model Context Protocol), tool servers, or building custom tool integrations for LLMs



Tech Stack

- Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, NanoBanana, Higgsfield, MCP, REST APIs, Webhooks, Git



What Sets You Apart

You don't just use AI tools — you build systems that make AI tools work together autonomously. You've shipped at least one project where an AI agent completes a multi-step task end-to-end without human intervention. You understand that the hardest part isn't the individual API calls — it's the orchestration, the edge cases, and making the whole pipeline reliable at scale.



You're comfortable in ambiguity. This space is new and moving fast. You'll often be the first person to figure out how to make two services talk to each other in a way nobody has documented yet.

title: AI Operations Builder
description:
We're a small US-based agency (NVZN) that helps small businesses get their operations in order. We build websites, custom dashboards, and backend automations for our clients. We need a technical builder to work alongside the founder on the build side of projects.



This is NOT a traditional developer role. We "vibe code" - meaning we use AI tools (primarily Claude Code) to build things fast. You describe what you want, the AI writes the code, you test it, iterate, and ship. If you've never used Claude Code or AI-assisted coding, this isn't the right fit.



What you'll be building:



Client websites (Astro, React, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel)

Custom command center dashboards (Next.js, Supabase)

Backend automations using n8n, 
, and Zapier

GoHighLevel workflows (pipelines, triggers, webhooks, SMS sequences)

API integrations between tools (webhooks, REST APIs, OAuth flows)



Must-have skills:



Experience with Claude Code or similar AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot) — you need to be comfortable building with AI, not writing everything from scratch

n8n workflow building (our primary automation platform)


 scenario building

GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, triggers)

Basic web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, React) or the ability to build well with claude code

Comfortable with Git, terminal commands, and deploying to Vercel

Can work US Mountain Time hours (at least 4-hour overlap)



Nice to have:



Zapier experience

Supabase / PostgreSQL

Astro framework

API debugging and webhook troubleshooting



How we work:



You'll get detailed specs or plans for what needs to be built

You build it using Claude Code and your own skills

We review together, iterate, and ship

Communication is async (WhatsAPP) with weekly video calls



We move fast and keep things simple



This is a long-term contract role with the opportunity to move into a full-time position in the coming months. We're looking for someone reliable, sharp, and self-directed who wants to grow with a small agency. If you need hand-holding on every task, this isn't it.

* Helping create scalable workflows for business owners to claim, pay for, and manage listings



**Required Skills**



* Strong hands-on experience with Wix Studio

* Strong experience with Velo by Wix

* Strong understanding of Wix CMS, dynamic pages, and dataset permissions

* Solid technical SEO knowledge

* Experience implementing and validating JSON-LD schema

* Understanding of page indexing, structured data, metadata, canonical issues, redirects, and internal linking

* Experience building payment-related flows inside Wix, including Pricing Plans, gated pages, paid member access, or listing claim systems

* Ability to troubleshoot custom logic involving logged-in members, CMS records, and permissions

* Strong written communication and daily status reporting



**Nice to Have**



* Experience with directory-style websites

* Experience building claim-a-listing workflows

* Experience with attorney, local service, employer, or resource directories

* Familiarity with Google Search Console and SEO QA

* Experience improving site architecture for large content sites



**What Success Looks Like**



* Pages are built correctly and function properly

* JSON/schema is implemented accurately and without errors

* Technical SEO issues are identified and fixed proactively

* Payment and claim workflows work cleanly

* CMS and member permissions are set up correctly

* Communication is consistent, direct, and reliable

* Clear daily updates are provided with completed work, blockers, and next steps



**Communication Expectations**



* Daily end-of-day status updates are required

* Must communicate blockers clearly and early

* Must respond directly to project-related questions within a reasonable timeframe during working hours

* Must be comfortable documenting work and providing handoff notes when needed



**To Apply, Please Include**



1. Examples of Wix Studio sites you have built

2. Examples of technical SEO work you have completed

3. Examples of JSON-LD/schema you have implemented

4. A description of any Wix payment, pricing plan, gated-access, or claim-listing workflows you have built

5. Confirmation that you are comfortable with daily updates and written documentation

6. Your availability and hourly or project rate



**Screening Questions**



1. Have you built in Wix Studio using Velo and CMS dynamic pages?

2. Have you implemented JSON-LD schema manually in Wix?

3. Have you set up Pricing Plans, gated pages, or paid access in Wix?

4. Have you connected logged-in members to CMS-based workflows?

5. How would you approach a “claim this listing” feature for existing directory pages?

6. What technical SEO tasks inside Wix are you strongest at?

7. Can you provide daily end-of-day updates?

title: Accountant / Accounts Assistant
description:
Here’s the final version with that requirement clearly embedded and positioned to filter properly:



---



## **NDIS Accountant Assistant (Accounts Receivable, Bookkeeping & Payroll Support)**



We are an Australian-based healthcare and disability services business seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Accountant Assistant to support our day-to-day financial operations.



This is a hands-on role focused on maintaining strong cash flow, accurate financial records, and clean payroll processes. You will play a key role in ensuring the financial side of the business runs efficiently.



We are looking for someone dependable, proactive, and interested in long-term growth within the business.



---



### **Your Core Responsibilities**



**Accounts Receivable (Daily Priority)**



* Monitor outstanding invoices and follow up daily

* Call and
 plan managers and clients to chase overdue payments

* Maintain clear records of all follow-ups and outcomes

* Identify and escalate payment risks early



**Bookkeeping**



* Maintain accurate financial records

* Reconcile transactions and ensure data integrity

* Assist with invoicing and tracking financial performance



**Payroll Support (Fortnightly)**



* Prepare payroll data for review

* Scrutinise timesheets and identify inconsistencies

* Receive and organise payroll-related requests from staff

* Assist in ensuring payroll is processed accurately and on time



**Expense Management**



* Review and assess employee expense requests

* Ensure all claims are valid, reasonable, and supported

* Prepare summaries for approval



**Reporting**



* Generate clear, structured reports on receivables, payroll issues, and expenses

* Track outstanding invoices and actions taken

* Highlight problems and recommend solutions



---



### **Key Requirements**



* Strong experience in bookkeeping, accounts receivable, or accounting support

* Confident making outbound calls to follow up unpaid invoices

* **Must be able to use VOIP systems to make outbound calls reliably**

* High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

* Reliable and able to work independently

* Strong written and spoken English

* Comfortable using spreadsheets and online systems

* **Must be available to work Monday to Friday, 9:00am to 5:00pm AEST (Australian time)**



---



### **Highly Valued Experience (Bonus)**



* Experience with **MYOB**

* Experience with **ShiftCare**

* Familiarity with **NDIS Plan Management, NDIA processes, or PRODA**

* Previous experience chasing overdue invoices in an Australian business



---



### **Work Details**



* Full-time role

* Monday to Friday, 9:00am to 5:00pm AEST

* Long-term position with growth opportunities

* Paid weekly



---



### **Important**



This role involves daily follow-up of unpaid invoices. You must be comfortable having firm, professional conversations about payments and deadlines.



---



### **To Apply**



Please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with accounts receivable and bookkeeping

3. An example of how you handled overdue payments

4. Confirmation of your VOIP setup and calling experience

5. Your internet reliability and backup options

6. Your availability for an interview



---



If you are dependable, detail-focused, and take ownership of your work, we want to hear from you.

title: Google VEO 3 Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Google Veo 3 Specialist



Our fast-growing e-commerce brand is scaling toward 8-figures and beyond, and we’re ready to level up our creative production with the power of Google Veo 3. We’re looking for a Google Veo 3 Specialist to help us manage, refine, and execute AI-generated video ads that support our marketing goals.



To show you’ve carefully read this post, please start your response with the word peach before introducing yourself. Below, you’ll find the key responsibilities, requirements, and a few quick questions so we can get to know your experience.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prompt Creation & Optimization: Write, test, and refine prompts to generate high-quality video ads using Google Veo 3.

- Workflow Coordination: Manage the full AI production pipeline—concept to final output—ensuring deadlines are met.

- Creative Alignment: Collaborate with our marketing and UGC teams to blend AI-generated content with human-made assets.

- Quality Review: Ensure all outputs are polished, on-brand, and ready for launch.

- Innovation & Mastery: Stay up to date with Google Veo 3 features, updates, and best practices to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Documentation: Maintain a clear system for tracking prompts, revisions, and final deliverables.



Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with Google Veo 3 and AI video generation.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple creative projects at once.

- Good communication skills for working with both AI and human creators.

- Comfortable using project management tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or similar.

- Consistent availability for 8 hours daily, 6 days per week.

- Bonus: Background in marketing, video production, or AI prompt engineering.



Questions for You:

- Have you worked directly with Google Veo 3 before? If so, tell us about your projects.

- How do you approach prompt testing and refining to get the best results?

- What’s your system for keeping multiple AI video projects organized?

- Are you comfortable balancing both creative expectations and technical workflows?

- Can you commit to 8 hours per day, 6 days per week, for this role?



If you’re passionate about AI-powered creativity and love working with cutting-edge tools like Google Veo 3, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Experienced Media Buyer for DTC Brand (Meta Ads)
description:
This is not a beginner role and not a “set up some campaigns” role.



We are a fast-scaling DTC brand currently spending ~$2,500/day on Meta at ~4.8x ROAS.



We already have strong creative and a working system.



Your job is to take what’s working and scale it aggressively to $10k–$20k/day+ without breaking performance.



You will be responsible for:



Budget allocation

Campaign structure

Scaling strategy

Performance stability



???? Primary Outcome



Scale ad spend from:



$2.5k/day ? $10k–$20k/day+



While maintaining strong efficiency and stability.



?? Current Setup (So You Know What You’re Walking Into)

Meta Ads only (for now)

Single CBO that handles both testing + scaling

Strong creative pipeline (this is our edge)

Consistent profitability (~4.8x ROAS)



We are looking to:



Increase creative volume significantly

Break out winners and scale more aggressively (using ABO structures)



???? Responsibilities

Manage and optimize Meta ad account daily

Scale budgets without tanking performance (currently scaling 20%/day)

Identify winning creatives quickly and allocate spend accordingly

Test and implement new campaign structures 

Improve stability as spend increases

Work closely with creative strategist (me) to give feedback on what’s converting

Make fast, data-driven decisions



? What we're looking for

Has scaled DTC brands to $20k/day+ spend on Meta

Strong understanding of creative-driven performance (this is NOT a technical-only account)

Knows how to:

Scale winning ads

Control CPA while increasing spend

Handle volatility at higher budgets

Comfortable working with:

CBO + ABO strategies

Fast testing environments

Moves fast and communicates clearly

Doesn’t need hand-holding



? Disqualifiers

Agency juniors / button-clickers

People who rely on slow testing cycles

Overly “safe” media buyers who can’t scale aggressively

Anyone without real DTC scaling experience

???? Compensation



Flexible depending on experience:



Base retainer

Performance incentives (based on spend / revenue / ROAS targets)



We want someone who is aligned with growth, not just a flat fee operator.



???? Why This Role Is Different

You are not fixing a broken account — you are scaling a winning one

Creative is handled at a high level (your job is to leverage it)

Clear goal: push spend hard while staying profitable

Opportunity to grow with a brand aiming for serious scale



???? Application Requirements



To be considered, include:



Brands you’ve scaled (with daily spend levels)

Highest daily spend you’ve managed profitably

Your approach to scaling from $2k/day ? $10k+/day

title: Graphic & Packaging Design Specialist
description:
Job Title: Graphic & Packaging Design Specialist



Location: Remote  

Type: Part-Time (Potential to transition to Full-Time)



---



About the Role  

We are looking for a highly skilled, technical, and creative Graphic & Packaging Design Specialist to lead the visual development of our physical brand. This role is specifically for a designer who understands that great packaging is where art meets engineering.



You will be responsible for the end-to-end design process—from the initial creative concept to the technical preparation of dyelines for manufacturing. We need someone who can work independently and efficiently, moving from a blank canvas to a high-fidelity 3D render with speed and precision.



---



Key Responsibilities



- Packaging Design & Production: Design and execute retail-ready packaging, including custom boxes, Mylar bags, tube stickers, and label designs.

- Technical Dyeline Management: Expertly use and edit dyelines and product outlines, ensuring all designs are perfectly aligned for print, including bleeds, safe zones, and technical specs.

- 3D & Image Rendering: Create high-end 3D renderings and GLB files of finished packaging to be used for web visuals and marketing materials.

- Merch Design: Conceptualize and design branded merchandise and apparel.

- Marketing Assets: Design high-impact digital and print assets, including flyers, insert cards, pop-up banners, and programmatic digital ads.

- Brand Consistency: Maintain and evolve the brand’s visual identity across all physical and digital touchpoints.



---



Required Skills & Experience



- Professional Portfolio: A strong, diverse portfolio showcasing real-world packaging projects (boxes, bags, and stickers are a must).

- Technical Expertise: Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator & Photoshop) and specialized tools for 3D product rendering.

- Print Mastery: Deep understanding of the technicalities of print production, material finishes, and structural design.

- Speed & Efficiency: Proven ability to complete tasks quickly while maintaining a high standard of polished, "retail-ready" work.

- Independence: A self-starter who can interpret creative direction with minimal oversight and provide proactive design solutions.

- Communication: Excellent written English and the ability to manage multiple project timelines reliably.



---



Nice to Have



- Experience working with eCommerce or consumer brands (specifically within the hemp or wellness space).

- Familiarity with paid media creative requirements and visual storytelling.

- Understanding of the manufacturing process for different packaging materials.



---



Why Join Us?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in a flexible, results-oriented environment.

- Creative Impact: You will be the primary hands-on designer for our physical product line.

- Startup Growth: Join a fast-moving, collaborative team with long-term growth potential and increasing responsibility.



---



To Apply: Please submit your resume along with a link to your working portfolio. Note: Applications without a portfolio showcasing packaging and 3D rendering work will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Stack AI Engineer
description:
We are looking for a builder who can design, develop, and deploy production-ready AI agent systems.



This is not a research role. You will be responsible for connecting LLMs to real-world workflows (APIs, CRMs, voice systems, databases) and shipping systems that are reliable, scalable, and cost-efficient.



If your experience is primarily tutorials or prototypes without real users, this role is not a fit.



What You’ll Do

Build end-to-end AI agent systems (frontend ? backend ? LLM ? automation)

Integrate LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) into real workflows

Design and implement RAG pipelines (embeddings + vector databases)

Build and consume RESTful and WebSocket APIs

Deploy and manage systems in AWS, GCP, or Azure

Optimize for latency, cost, and reliability

Implement logging, monitoring, and production debugging

Apply security best practices (rate limiting, validation, API key handling)

Required Skills

Full-stack development (Node.js + Vite.js with React or Vue)

Python backend development (FastAPI or Flask; async preferred)

Experience with LLM APIs (prompting, embeddings, function calling)

Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)

Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis

REST + WebSocket API development

Cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

CI/CD and containerization (Docker; Kubernetes is a plus)

Git version control

Experience debugging production systems

AI Experience (Required)



You must have shipped at least one of the following:



AI agents (multi-step workflows, tool usage)

RAG systems (retrieval + generation)

Function calling / tool-integrated systems

LLM-based automation pipelines

What We Care About (Non-Negotiable)

You have shipped real systems used by real users

You can connect LLMs to APIs, databases, and workflows

You think in terms of automation and outcomes, not just code

You understand cost control, latency, and hallucination mitigation

You can work with incomplete requirements and figure things out

Nice to Have

LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face

Serverless (AWS Lambda, Cloud Functions)

Real-time pipelines / streaming systems

AI API cost optimization strategies

title: Creative Strategist (Part-Time, Remote | Contractor)
description:
Company: Socialyte

Location: Remote (Philippines/Mexico preferred)

Type: Part-Time Independent Contractor



Compensation Structure



This is a contractor role with a flat base salary plus per-client earnings that grow as your client load grows.

Base Salary: $138/month (Covers core responsibilities including graphics, carousels, and execution document production)



Month 1 — Strategy Build Fee: $300 per client (Applies to all packages — this is paid for every new client you onboard)

Month 2+ — Monthly Residual Per Active Client:



Standard package ($800): $150/month per client

Execution package ($2,000): $180/month per client

Growth package ($2,500): $200/month per client

Monetization package ($3,500): $250/month per client



The more clients you manage, the more you earn. This structure rewards consistency and quality.



About the Role



We're looking for a Creative Strategist who can turn client business goals into clear, executable content plans — without needing their hand held.

This is a strategy-first, systems-based role at the intersection of research, creative direction, and execution planning. You won't be filming or editing — you'll be designing the system that execution follows. If you love figuring out why content works and building frameworks that make creative teams faster, this role is for you.



What You'll Own



* Client content strategy — translating business goals into content pillars, audience positioning, and repeatable frameworks

* Content planning — monthly content calendars, platform allocation, scripted vs. unscripted breakdown

* Production prep — scripts, talking points, shot lists, and format direction

* Creative Execution Packs — editing instructions, hooks, pacing, structure, music, and branding rules handed off cleanly to production

* Content review & approval — reviewing edited content for strategic alignment, writing clear revision notes

* Folder & drive management — keeping client folders organized and up to date throughout the client lifecycle

* Performance & optimization — monthly analytics reviews, refining hooks and formats based on results

* Trend & research — staying ahead on TikTok, Instagram, and Creative Center; maintaining shared hook and format libraries





What You Will NOT Do



* Film, edit, or post content

* Handle client communication or DMs

* Create ClickUp tasks or manage project admin

* Seek approval for standard strategy decisions





What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



?? MUST be fluent in English — spoken and written. This is a non-negotiable requirement. You will be expected to communicate clearly and professionally in English at all times, including on client kickoff calls.

* Strong understanding of short-form content strategy (TikTok, Instagram Reels)

* Experience analyzing viral content and identifying repeatable hook frameworks

* Ability to write clear, detailed execution documents that creators and editors can follow without follow-up

* Proficient with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) — AI usage is required, not optional

* Excellent async written communication — you'll work primarily through ClickUp

* Highly organized, self-directed, and able to manage multiple clients at once

* Responds within 24 hours during business days





Nice-to-haves:



* Experience with Canva, Vista Social, TikTok Creative Center, or Poppy AI

* Background in social media marketing, content production, or creative direction

* Experience working in a remote async team environment





Performance Expectations



* Deliver new client strategies within 5 business days of intake completion

* Analyze a minimum of 50–100 viral videos per niche per strategy build

* Keep no more than 10% of assigned tasks overdue in any given month

* Use AI tools consistently as part of your weekly workflow

* Maintain clean, organized client folders with no outstanding backlogs





Tools You'll Use



ClickUp · Claude AI · Poppy AI · Vista Social · TikTok Creative Center · Instagram · Canva





You're the Right Fit If:



* You can look at a client's goals and immediately start building a content framework

* Your execution documents are so clear that no one has to ask follow-up questions

* You stay ahead of trends — not because you're told to, but because you can't help it

* You're comfortable working async and communicating everything through docs and Loom

* You actively use AI as a core part of how you research, ideate, and produce strategy





How to Apply



* A short intro about your background in content strategy

* 1–2 examples of strategy work, execution documents, or content frameworks you've built

* The tools and AI platforms you regularly use in your workflow

* Your availability 





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Amazon Brand Manager (US Market Focus) - with strong English language skills
description:
At EQUALICE, we’re not just looking for employees to fill a position — we’re looking for passionate individuals who bring initiative, creativity, and fresh ideas to our team. People who are eager to grow with us and actively contribute to continuously improving what we do.



Job Description:

As an Amazon Brand Manager, you will be responsible for managing and optimizing our Amazon accounts to drive sales and ensure excellent customer service. You will work closely with our PPC, design, and troubleshooting teams to create strategies, solve problems, and improve our product listings.



Your Responsibilities:

Strategic planning and comprehensive management of our clients' Amazon accounts, with a strong focus on the US

marketplace.

Optimization and management of Amazon product listings, including pricing strategies, inventory management, and content optimization.

Regular reporting and analysis of account performance, deriving actionable insights and recommendations to drive growth.

Prepare regular reports on account performance, maintain close collaboration with clients to achieve revenue and performance targets.

Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.

Collaborate with the PPC team to develop and execute effective advertising campaigns. 

Work with the design team to enhance product listings, including content optimization and image enhancements.

Coordinate with the troubleshooting team to resolve technical issues promptly and effectively.



Qualifications:



Proven experience in managing Amazon seller and vendor accounts, ideally with a focus on the US market.

Strong understanding of Amazon PPC, SEO, and listing optimization. 

Excellent customer service skills. 

Excellent command of English, both written and spoken — no German language skills required.

Independent, structured, and proactive work approach combined with strong teamwork



What We Offer:

The opportunity to actively contribute to the success of our clients on Amazon and shape their growth in one of the world’s leading marketplaces.

Competitive Salary and benefits package. 

Flexible working conditions. 

A supportive, innovative, dynamic and collaborative work environment.

Professional development and training opportunities within a fast-growing, dynamic company.





Interested in joining us?

If you’re looking for a new challenge and want to be part of a motivated, international team, we’d be happy to hear from you. Apply now and let’s grow together!



See you soon,

title: Admin Assistant for High-Level Clients
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Administrative Assistant. This role is responsible for overseeing Mike Barron’s high-level clients. The Administrative Assistant will work directly with the owner of the company and the supervisors, who will play a vital role in supporting our high-level students, ensuring their success when it comes to building a company. Your primary responsibility will be to manage high level accounts, keep these accounts organized, work with the owner of the company when it comes to scheduling, ensure that these clients are completing the program and utilizing all inside personnel to get tasks completed.



Responsibilities:

Work directly with founder Mike Barron and his supervisors to manage and support high-level client accounts.

Schedule meetings between Mike Barron, supervisors, and partners to ensure alignment and progress.

Equip partners with the essential tools they need for success.

Serve as the primary point of contact for partners, handling communication across various channels with professionalism and efficiency.

Manage invitations to partner events featuring Mike Barron, confirming attendance and ensuring seamless coordination.

Oversee client progress in programs, ensuring they are meeting milestones and utilizing all available resources and personnel.

Keep accounts and schedules organized to streamline operations and enhance client satisfaction.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience as an Administrative Assistant or in a similar role.

Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills.

Strong written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with scheduling tools.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.

A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a client-focused approach.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.



About Mike Barron & Limelight Media LLC:

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. Many of our students are seeking career change and or looking to acquire high-ticket skill sets so as to achieve career advancement and financial freedom. We are leaders in the online coaching industry and have receipts of multiple “Two Comma Club” Awards.



I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and 
 and "influence" is a cornerstone of our operation. We create daily content, record coaching calls, case studies, short films, etc... The culture is fast-paced, raw, and fun... I was a former school President in my last job in 2013, and let's just say I'm Far (far) removed from that corporate-type environment. You can learn more about our community here: 
/watch?v=LdqINft4osw&t=75s.





A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!



Limelight Media offers many packages that teach personal awareness, sales techniques, skills to become a master closer, and how to become the best version of yourself!



Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.



For faster processing, please send resumes to 
 (
).

title: CPA /Senior Accountant
description:
Are you ready to take your accounting career to the next level? We are a US-based real estate investment and management company seeking a talented and motivated Senior Accountant to join our growing international team. This is a remote, full-time role based in the Philippines, where you’ll work directly with our US leadership during US business hours.

If you’re passionate about real estate accounting, thrive in fast-paced environments, and want to contribute to exciting projects across multiple entities, this is the opportunity for you.



What You’ll Do

As our Senior Accountant, you’ll be a key player in keeping our financial operations accurate, compliant, and efficient. You won’t just be crunching numbers—you’ll be driving clarity and insights that help us grow.

Manage the full accounting cycle, including journal entries, reconciliations, and month/quarter-end close.

Prepare accurate financial statements and management reports.

Handle accounts payable/receivable, tenant ledgers, and vendor payments

Oversee bank reconciliations and investigate discrepancies.

Assist with budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis.

Partner with CPAs during audits and tax filings.

Ensure compliance with US GAAP, Cash, and Modified Cash standards.

Maintain accurate financial data in AppFolio and QuickBooks Online (QBO).

Provide insightful reporting and analysis to the CFO and leadership team.



What We’re Looking For

We want someone who is not only technically strong but also proactive, communicative, and eager to add value.



Required:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

3–5 years of accounting experience with a US-based real estate company.

Strong knowledge of property management and hospitality accounting.

Hands-on experience with AppFolio and QuickBooks Online (QBO).

Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken.

Meticulous attention to detail, organizational strength, and reliability in meeting deadlines.

Flexibility to work US business hours.



Preferred:

CPA license (Philippines or US).

Experience with multi-entity structures and consolidations.

Familiarity with investor reporting and distributions.

Strong Excel skills, especially for financial modeling and analysis.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

Competitive pay with long-term career growth opportunities.

A chance to work directly with US executives and decision-makers.

Exposure to exciting real estate and hospitality projects across the US.

A professional yet supportive team culture where your work is valued.

A stable role in an expanding international company with room to grow.



Here, your skills will make an immediate impact, and your career will grow alongside our company’s success.



If you’re ready to take ownership, make a difference, and build a rewarding career in real estate accounting, we’d love to meet you.



Apply now and become an essential part of our accounting team.

title: Seedance 2.0 Specialist
description:
Our fast-growing e-commerce brand is scaling toward 8-figures and beyond, and we're ready to level up our creative production with the power of Seedance 2.0. We're looking for a Seedance 2.0 Specialist to help us manage, refine, and execute AI-generated video ads that support our marketing goals.



To show you've carefully read this post, please start your response with the word peach before introducing yourself.

Below, you'll find the key responsibilities, requirements, and a few quick questions so we can get to know your experience.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prompt Creation & Optimization: Write, test, and refine prompts to generate high-quality video ads using Seedance 2.0.

- Workflow Coordination: Manage the full AI production pipeline—concept to final output—ensuring deadlines are met.

- Creative Alignment: Collaborate with our marketing and UGC teams to blend AI-generated content with human-made assets.

- Quality Review: Ensure all outputs are polished, on-brand, and ready for launch.

- Innovation & Mastery: Stay up to date with Seedance 2.0 features, updates, and best practices to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Documentation: Maintain a clear system for tracking prompts, revisions, and final deliverables.



Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with Seedance 2.0 and AI video generation.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple creative projects at once.

- Good communication skills for working with both AI and human creators.

- Comfortable using project management tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or similar.

- Consistent availability for 6–8 hours daily, 6 days per week.

- Bonus: Background in marketing, video production, or AI prompt engineering.



Questions for You:



- Have you worked directly with Seedance 2.0 before? If so, tell us about your projects.

- How do you approach prompt testing and refining to get the best results?

- What's your system for keeping multiple AI video projects organized?

- Are you comfortable balancing both creative expectations and technical workflows?

- Can you commit to 6–8 hours per day, 6 days per week, for this role?



If you're passionate about AI-powered creativity and love working with cutting-edge tools like Seedance 2.0, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Online Chat Sales Specialist — High-Earning Remote Role
description:
We are hiring Chat Sales Specialists to join our growing remote team. You will be chatting with paying subscribers on a content platform, building relationships, and driving sales through conversation. This is a long-term, full-time position with real earning potential — not a one-time gig.

If you've ever worked in customer service, live chat, sales, virtual assistance, or even dating apps — and you're great at written English — this role will feel natural to you. We provide full training, scripts, and support. You just need to bring the right attitude and communication skills.

Why This Role Is Different:

This isn't a BPO call center. There are no phone calls. Everything is text-based. You'll be chatting one-on-one with subscribers, making them feel valued, and naturally guiding conversations toward purchases. Think of it as a mix between a sales rep and a relationship manager — all through messaging.

Your Day-to-Day:



Chat with subscribers via direct messages on a content platform

Build genuine connections that keep subscribers engaged and spending

Sell premium content using scripts and frameworks we provide

Adapt your communication style to match different subscriber personalities

Report your daily performance (messages, response time, sales)



Who We're Looking For:



Strong written English — you write naturally, not robotically. Slang, humor, and tone matter.

Typing speed of 50+ WPM

Laptop or desktop computer with stable internet (no phone-only setups)

Available for 8-hour shifts. We have morning, afternoon, and overnight shifts available.

You're a people person — you enjoy conversation and know how to make someone feel special

Hardworking, reliable, and coachable — you show up on time and take feedback well



Experience in any of these is a plus (but not required):



Live chat support or customer service

Online sales or telemarketing

Virtual assistant work

Social media management

CRM tools



What You'll Earn:



Base pay: $3–$5 per hour depending on experience

Performance-based commission on sales — our top earners make significantly more than base pay alone

Weekly or bi-weekly payments

Full training provided before you start — no experience in this specific industry needed



Shifts Available (US Eastern Time):



Morning: 6AM – 2PM EST

Afternoon: 2PM – 10PM EST

Overnight: 10PM – 6AM EST



Let us know which shift(s) work for you.



How to Apply

Please read carefully — applications that skip these steps will not be reviewed.



Click "Apply for this Job" and write us a message. Do NOT copy-paste a generic application.

In your message, include:



Your name and age

Which shift(s) you can work

Your typing speed (test at 
)

Your English level

Any relevant work experience (chat support, sales, VA, etc.)

Answer this question: "A paying customer messages you saying he's been feeling ignored and is thinking about leaving. What would you say to keep him?" (No right or wrong answer — we want to see how you communicate.)





At the very bottom of your message, write: "I have read the full description."



Thoughtful applications will be contacted with next steps. We are hiring on an ongoing basis — even if there's no immediate opening when you apply, strong candidates will be kept in our pipeline.

title: Meta Paid Ads Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Meta Paid Ads Buyer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there? 

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job? 

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now? 

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?



Keywords

 ads manager,

title: Back-end Developer
description:
At L’EVATE Inc., we connect top-tier talent with leading Canadian innovators.



Our client — a fast-growing FINTECH leader — is building secure, scalable, cloud-native platforms that power real financial transactions and mission-critical systems.



We’re looking for a Back End Developer who thrives on clean architecture, performance optimization, and building robust APIs using 
 and Azure technologies.



What You’ll Do



Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade backend services using C# 
 Core



Architect and optimize RESTful APIs and system integrations



Build scalable services within Azure PaaS (App Services, Functions, Logic Apps)



Design and optimize complex SQL Server queries, stored procedures, and database performance



Implement authentication, authorization, and API security best practices



Collaborate closely with QA, DevOps, and Product teams in an agile environment



Champion clean code, automated testing, and CI/CD standards



What You Bring



5+ years of professional backend development experience



Strong expertise in C# / .NET Core

title: Senior SaaS Developer / Technical Lead Needed
description:
Prisma + Supabase + API + Worker/Deployment Debugging



I have an application that is about 80% complete. It was built primarily through Claude, and I’m now at the stage where the remaining issues are beyond what I can confidently troubleshoot on my own.



I am **not** looking for someone to rewrite the app from scratch.



I am looking for a **senior-level developer / technical lead** who is comfortable working in an **AI-assisted development workflow**, where **Claude continues generating most of the code** and you act as the architect, debugger, reviewer, and decision-maker.



I need someone who can:

- review an existing AI-generated codebase

- diagnose bugs and architectural issues

- troubleshoot worker-service, database, Prisma, schema, API, and deployment/container issues

- tell Claude exactly what to do next

- review Claude’s output and refine prompts/instructions as needed

- help me move the application from “mostly built” to stable and production-ready



Important ...

This is **not** a role for a junior developer.

This is also **not** a role for someone who is uncomfortable with AI-generated code.



The ideal person is someone who can look at an existing codebase, quickly understand what’s happening, identify root causes, and use AI tools effectively as a coding assistant rather than fight against them.



You should be strong in most of the following:

- TypeScript / JavaScript

- Prisma

- PostgreSQL / Supabase

- schema design and migrations

- API integrations

- worker/service debugging

- deployment containers

- debugging production/staging issues

- backend architecture

- async flows, queueing, and state issues

- reading and improving AI-generated code



Bonus if you have experience with:

- NestJS

- WebSockets / real-time systems

- rate limiting / retry logic

- observability / logs / metrics

- scaling service-based applications

- Claude Code or similar AI-assisted coding workflows



How we will work is:

- you diagnose and architect

- Claude writes most of the code

- you review and direct Claude

- you step in manually only when necessary to unblock or correct the implementation



In other words:

**Claude is the implementation engine; you are the senior engineer and technical lead.**



In the first phase, I want help with:

- identifying the highest-priority bugs/blockers

- stabilizing the worker/database/deployment issues

- clarifying what Claude should do next

- creating a reliable workflow so I can keep building without getting stuck



Ideal candidate:

- highly practical

- excellent at debugging

- comfortable leading AI-generated development

- able to translate vague technical problems into precise implementation steps

- not thrown off by partially messy or AI-written code

- strong enough to spot when the architecture itself is the issue



If you are a great fit, this can turn into a higher paying, long-term / ongoing role.



Please do **not** apply if you are mainly a prompt hobbyist or a junior developer using AI as a Vibecoder.



I need someone who can truly diagnose systems (without relying on AI), then direct the build intelligently.



-------------------------------------------------



Technical brief linked below. Review it BEFORE applying.





-------------------------------------------------



TO APPLY, please submit answers:



1. What experience do you have debugging Prisma, schema, database, or deployment issues in existing apps?



2. Have you worked in a Claude Code or Abacus / AI-assisted workflow before? If so, how do you use AI effectively without letting it create more problems?



3. How would you approach a codebase that is 90% complete but has worker-service and database bugs?



4. Are you comfortable acting as the senior technical lead while AI handles much of the implementation/writing?



5. What is your English speaking, reading, and writing level, and how many hours a day do you have overlap with the US time zones?

title: SEO ADMIN ASSISTANT
description:
ABOUT SHOP MARKETING PROS:

We are a marketing agency based in the United States with a stateside and international team of 50 professionals. Shop Marketing Pros is a very well-respected and rapidly growing Digital Marketing Company in the Automotive Repair Industry with strong core values and a superb track record of serving its clients better than the competitors. Our key services include Website Design, Digital Advertising, Search Engine Optimization, and Social Media Management. 



Our Core Values are of incredible importance to us. We live by our “SHIELD” so please visit 
/core-values/ and familiarize yourself with our Core Values before continuing. Please continue with this job description and application if you feel you align with these values.



JOB DESCRIPTION:

Shop Marketing Pros is seeking a proactive and highly organized SEO Admin Assistant to support the SEO department in executing and managing monthly client deliverables.



This role plays an important part in keeping our SEO operations organized, on track, and moving forward. You’ll work closely with the SEO Director, SEO Specialists, and Client Success Managers (CSMs) to help ensure deliverables are created, assigned, tracked, and completed accurately and on time.



The ideal candidate is comfortable following structured processes while also stepping back to understand how everything connects. You take pride in your work, stay organized, and are naturally attentive to details. You’re also open to sharing ideas, asking questions, and contributing to improvements that help the team operate more efficiently.



If you enjoy staying organized, keeping things moving, and being part of a collaborative team, you’ll do well in this role.





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE:

Monthly SEO deliverables are fully built out, assigned, and consistently moving forward in ClickUp

SEO Specialists and CSMs have what they need to complete their work without delays

The SEO team feels supported not just with tasks, but with execution and organization





REQUIRED SKILLS:

The ideal SEO Admin Assistant is someone who:

Is extremely organized and detail-oriented

Has a strong sense of ownership and accountability

Is a self-starter who does not wait to be told what to do next

Can follow structured processes while also identifying ways to improve them

Is confident communicating ideas, asking questions, and suggesting better ways to do things

Has strong written communication skills

Can manage multiple tasks and deadlines without losing accuracy

Is comfortable working in project management systems (ClickUp or similar)

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

Identify workflow inefficiencies and suggest improvements

Provide regular updates to the SEO Director on project status and any issues impacting production



MORE INFO + BENEFITS + PERKS:

This is a full-time, permanent, remote position (8 am to 4 pm Central Time).

13th Month Pay

8 Paid Holiday Leaves

Paid time off beginning Christmas Eve until New Year’s Day

An extraordinary team/company culture



INSTRUCTIONS FOR APPLICATION:

3. Include a link to your resume.

 me. All communication must remain within OLJ.

title: Customer Satisfaction & Trustpilot Growth Manager
description:
Customer Satisfaction & Trustpilot Growth Manager





About the role:



We run multiple fashion e-commerce brands operating on a dropshipping model, with Google Shopping as our primary revenue channel. Trustpilot is one of the most critical assets in our business — it directly influences our Google Merchant Center health, our ad account longevity, and whether customers trust us enough to buy again.

Right now, our review scores don't reflect the real quality of our customer experience. Satisfied customers stay silent; frustrated ones leave reviews. We need someone who takes full ownership of fixing that — across all our brands, not just one.

This is not a traditional customer service role. You will sit between the CS team, the
 marketing team, and the founders. You'll be our internal voice of the customer: spotting problems before they become reviews, designing systems that get happy customers to speak up, and proactively pushing ideas that make the experience better.

 

What you'll own:



• Trustpilot score improvement across all brands — this is your primary KPI

• Post-purchase review generation campaigns in Klaviyo — you'll design flows, incentives, and A/B tests together with the
 marketing team

• Customer complaint triage — catching unhappy buyers early (before they hit Trustpilot) and routing them to fast, fair resolutions

• Bridge between CS agents,
 marketing, and the founders — you'll translate customer patterns into actionable improvements

• Proactive improvement proposals — every week you should be identifying one thing we can do better, whether that's a flow timing, a packaging insert, an incentive structure, or a response script

• Review monitoring and response across platforms — Trustpilot, Google Reviews, and any other public-facing review channels

• Tracking and reporting — you'll maintain a live dashboard of all scores, test results, and review trends across all brands

 

What we're looking for:



• Experience in e-commerce customer service, retention, or reputation management

• Comfortable working in Klaviyo or eager to learn fast — you'll be building and editing flows hands-on

• Strong written communication in English (Dutch or French a plus for Benelux brands)

• Data-oriented — you track what you do and can show what moved

• You bring ideas. We don't want someone who waits for a brief. If you see a problem, you come with a proposed fix.

• Able to manage multiple brands simultaneously without dropping balls

 

Nice to have:



• Experience with Trustpilot's platform, review removal requests, or verified review campaigns

• Background in fashion, lifestyle, or beauty e-commerce

• Familiarity with Shopify and post-purchase flows

 

What we offer:



• Fully remote, flexible working hours

• Direct access to the founders — your input shapes real decisions

• Performance bonus tied directly to Trustpilot score improvement and review volume targets

• The chance to build a system from scratch and see the results of your work immediately



How to apply: Qualified candidates may send their application to: coo at abcom dot be
