title: Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer
description:
Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer



Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



* Work Hours: 9 AM–6 PM US CST, Monday–Friday

* Reliable Technology: Stable internet connection (?10 Mbps) and dedicated computer

* Hubstaff Usage: Time tracking and productivity monitoring required

* Video Meetings: Camera on for all video calls

* Full-Time Focus: No concurrent employment or freelance contracts



Job Title

Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer

Job Description

Buzz Digital Agency is seeking a highly skilled Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer to architect, build, and maintain client-facing websites. You’ll leverage both no-code/low-code platforms and custom front-end scripting to deliver polished, performance-optimized sites on time, every time. If you’re passionate about web craftsmanship and thrive in a remote environment, we want to hear from you!

Roles & Responsibilities



* Client Website Builds

* Architect, develop, and deliver fully responsive websites in WordPress (Elementor/Divi/ACF) and Webflow

* Configure themes, templates, custom fields, and page-builder layouts to match design comps

* Domain, Hosting & Deployment

* Manage DNS settings, SSL certificates, hosting environments (staging & production), and backups

* Oversee deployment workflows and rollback procedures

* Custom Front-End Enhancements

* Write clean, maintainable JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for animations, sliders, and form validations

* Implement lightweight scripts to extend CMS functionality without heavy back-end work

* Integrations & Automations

* Connect sites to
-marketing tools (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign), CRMs (GoHighLevel), payment gateways, and Zapier/Integromat

* Configure and test webhooks and RESTful API calls for seamless data flow

* Performance, Security & SEO

* Optimize images, implement caching and minification for fast load times

* Ensure on-page SEO fundamentals are in place (meta tags, structured data, sitemap)

* Harden sites against common vulnerabilities (XSS, SQL injection, brute-force)

* Collaboration & Version Control

* Partner with designers, marketers, and PMs to translate requirements into scalable solutions

* Maintain code in Git, perform peer reviews, and uphold branching/merging workflows

* Quality Assurance & Maintenance

* Conduct manual (and where feasible, automated) testing to catch regressions

* Troubleshoot, debug, and provide post-launch support—including uptime monitoring and error-log reviews

* Documentation & Client Handoff

* Prepare step-by-step documentation and training materials for client site management

* Provide a 30-day post-launch support window and live handover sessions

* Continuous Improvement

* Research and recommend new tools or processes to boost efficiency and quality

* Share knowledge via internal demos or lunch-and-learn sessions







Nice-to-Have: Mentoring junior developers; experience with Jira/Trello; familiarity with Google Analytics/Tag Manager.

Qualifications



* 5+ years of professional experience in WordPress and Webflow website development

* Advanced skills with Elementor, Divi, ACF, and Webflow CMS

* Strong command of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for front-end customizations

* Proven track record integrating third-party services via APIs and webhooks

* Deep understanding of DNS, SSL, hosting platforms, and deployment workflows

* Proficient with Git and collaborative development practices

* Excellent English communication—written and verbal

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-motivated in a remote setting





Performance Review & Increase: After a 3-month probationary period and successful milestone delivery, we’ll conduct a formal review with the opportunity to increase base pay toward mid-market rates.



* Benefits & Perks

* Paid Time Off (PTO):

* Earn 40 hours of PTO after completing one full year of employment.

Enjoy paid time off for all major U.S. holidays, including:

Are you someone who loves a fast-paced day and wearing a lot of different hats? Do you get satisfaction from staying organized and helping a business run smoothly behind the scenes? If so, you might be exactly who I’m looking for.



About Me:

I run a growing real estate photography business focused on delivering high-quality visuals and a seamless client experience. I care a lot about the details, staying organized, and creating a business that feels both efficient and enjoyable to be part of. I’m looking for a Virtual Assistant who can help me stay on top of it all as things continue to grow.



What You’ll Be Doing:

 • Client Outreach: Use my Instagram strategy to connect with potential new clients

        •.      Sourcing new leads via Redfin and 

 •
s, Messaging & Calls: Keep communication flowing with clients—answering questions and making sure they feel taken care of



What I’m Looking For:

 • Availability in Eastern Time (8 AM – 4 PM EST): All of my clients are in this time zone, so I need someone aligned with that schedule

 • Positive, Can-Do Attitude: I like to keep things upbeat and easy to work in

 • Flexible & Adaptable: No two days look exactly the same, so being able to pivot is really important



Why You’ll Love Working With Me:

 • Supportive, Low-Drama Environment: I want this to feel good and sustainable for both of us

 • Opportunity to Grow: As the business grows, there’s room for you to grow with it



Interested?

Send your resume, a screenshot of your internet speed test, and a quick video introducing yourself to 
 and I’ll be in touch with next steps!

title: Operations Specialist
description:
Adly is a technology, data, and performance-driven portfolio of SaaS subscription and content companies. Our founders have built, acquired, scaled, and successfully exited multiple SaaS, eCommerce, and marketing businesses, many of which are now part of Adly’s growing portfolio. Today, Adly includes social media growth SaaS platforms, AI-driven education technology companies, an
 marketing platform for local businesses, technology-enabled translation services, and more. We continue to expand through new acquisitions and by building innovative products from the ground up.



We are looking for an Operations Specialist to join our team and support the execution of core operational workflows across the business. In this role, you will focus on ensuring efficiency, accuracy, and consistency in day-to-day operations while contributing to process improvement and scalable system development.



Reporting to the Operations Manager, you will take a structured and detail-oriented approach to managing operational tasks, identifying gaps, and improving workflows. This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, dependable, and comfortable working with data, research, and cross-functional teams in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.



Responsibilities:

Support the execution of daily operational processes with accuracy and attention to detail

Manage and prioritize assigned tasks to ensure consistent and timely delivery

Conduct research and validate information to maintain high standards of data quality

Identify opportunities to enhance processes and support continuous improvement efforts

Develop and document clear, user-friendly standard operating procedures (SOPs)

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment and effective execution

Assist in testing and implementing process improvements, tools, or system updates

Report and follow through on operational issues as needed

Maintain organized and accurate internal records and databases



Skills & Qualifications:

2–3 years of experience in operations or a similar role

Strong organizational skills and a high level of attention to detail

Clear and professional communication skills

Ability to manage multiple responsibilities in a structured and reliable manner

Experience supporting or improving operational processes

Comfortable working with data, research, and administrative tools

Proficiency in G-Suite and Excel/Google Sheets

Familiarity with helpdesk or ticketing systems is an advantage

Demonstrates accountability, consistency, and a collaborative mindset





Preferred:

Experience with subscription-based or SaaS products

Familiarity with payment platforms (Stripe, Recurly, Chargebee, or similar) for processing refunds and managing subscriptions

Experience with project management tools (Asana, Jira, etc.)

Background in QA or product testing — ability to clearly describe bugs and reproduce issues

Experience working in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where things change quickly and ambiguity is normal



Complete this form to apply:

title: Content Creation & Copywriter

, X 
), and

title: Director of Operations (Property Management and Real Estate Experience Required)
description:
!!! URGENT HIRING !!!



Description:

We’re looking for an experienced and results-driven Director of Operations with a strong background in both the Property Management and Legal industries.



This is a senior leadership role — not an assistant or VA position. We need someone who has managed people, built systems, and driven measurable results across teams for companies. You’ll oversee operations, refine processes, and ensure that the business runs efficiently day to day.

If your background is limited to administrative work, appointment setting, or managing Airbnb units, this role is not for you. We’re specifically seeking someone who has operated at a management or director level within property management and legal operations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Oversee and optimize daily workflows across multiple departments.

- Develop and implement systems, SOPs, and processes that drive efficiency.

- Manage and mentor tea
mbers to achieve performance goals.

- Analyze operational challenges and design data-driven solutions.

- Maintain accountability across projects, timelines, and deliverables.

- Oversee documentation, communication flow, and performance reporting.

- Coordinate between property management and legal teams to ensure smooth operations.

- Support executive leadership with strategic planning and execution.



Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of proven experience in both Property Management and Legal Operations (required).

- Prior leadership or management experience, overseeing teams and workflows.

- Deep understanding of property management systems, legal operations, and compliance processes.

- Strong command of English (written and spoken). Must be Advanced/Fluent in English. We do not accept conversational English speakers.

- Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of independent decision-making.

- Proficient in CRMs, workflow management, and reporting tools.



Preferred (but not required):

- Experience creating or improving SOPs and automations.

- Familiarity with property management software (Buildium, AppFolio, RentManager, etc.).

- Prior experience managing cross-functional or remote teams.



Personality Fit:

- We’re looking for someone who:

- Takes ownership and pride in their work.

- Thrives in a fast-paced, results-oriented environment.

- Doesn’t wait to be told what to do, they anticipate what needs to be done.

- Holds themselves and their team accountable for outcomes.



Employment Type: Full-time, long-term position.

Work Hours: Must be flexible with U.S. (EST) business hours. 

Work Schedule: M-F 9-5 PM EST

Compensation: Competitive, based on experience and seniority.



Please apply directly to this job ad.

To apply:

Include your resume and a cover letter, maximum of 2 paragraphs, related to your sales experience only.

Subject line should be the position only. Example: “Director of Ops Application.” Nothing less, nothing more.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Remote Bookkeeper (Part-Time, EST Hours)
description:
Remote Bookkeeper (Part-Time, EST Hours)



Location: Remote – Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time

Schedule: Monday–Friday | Start between 7:00–9:00 AM EST | 4–5 hours/day

Compensation: $15–$20/hour based on experience | Paid weekly



About the Opportunity

We’re seeking a highly motivated Remote Bookkeeper to join a lean, fast-moving team in the home services industry. This is a permanent, part-time role ideal for a detail-oriented, self-sufficient professional who can work independently while supporting leadership with timely financial reports that drive business decisions.



The ideal candidate thrives in a structured remote environment, values accountability, and has experience managing daily financial workflows with minimal supervision. You’ll be a critical tea
mber ensuring the business runs with clarity, precision, and confidence.



Key Responsibilities

- Record daily transactions and reconcile bank activity using QuickBooks Online

- Compile and send daily financial summary reports (by 9:00 AM EST) to internal leadership

- Manage and update Excel-based job costing reports

- Track and report payments by method (cash, check, financing, etc.)

- Input contract totals from sales closed the previous day

- Organize and enter installer crew activity and purchase orders

- Interface with operations team via Slack and submit End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Maintain a consistent, dependable reporting cadence



Required Skills & Experience

- Minimum 2 years of professional experience in bookkeeping or accounting

- Daily user of QuickBooks Online – able to work without hand-holding

- Fluent in English with strong written communication skills

- Proficient with Microsoft Excel for building, maintaining, and analyzing reports

- Experience working remotely with independent time management

- Dependable internet connection and a quiet, professional home office setup



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience using Salesforce or Lead Perfection CRM platforms

- Familiarity with job costing methods and contractor/vendor purchase tracking

- Prior experience supporting businesses in the home improvement or services sector

- Associates or Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or related field (not required if experienced)



Work Environment & Tools

- Communication: Slack (you will be onboarded to the workspace)

- Daily Reporting: Submit morning summaries and EOD logs via internal systems

- Supervision: Minimal – must be dependable, accountable, and self-driven

- Team Size: 5 total, including owners and a department manager

- Measurement: Your performance will be tracked using clear, agreed-upon KPIs



Candidate Traits We're Looking For

- Detail-Oriented: You spot issues before others do

- Self-Starter: You take initiative without needing to be chased

- Time-Conscious: You meet your deadlines and respect others’ time

- Growth-Minded: You’re willing to learn and evolve with the role

- Team-Friendly: You communicate clearly and play well with others, even remotely



Compensation & Logistics

- Hourly Rate: $15–$20/hour based on experience

- Payment Schedule: Weekly via EOR

- Start Date: Target start by Monday, June 2, 2025

- Role Type: Permanent, Part-Time



How to Apply

Apply with your resume and include brief responses to the screening questions listed BELOW. Strong candidates will be contacted for a screening call and invited to meet the hiring manager and owner during the final stage.



Pre-Screening Questions

1. Do you have at least 2 years of bookkeeping experience, including daily use of QuickBooks Online?

2. Are you available to begin your workday between 7:00–9:00 AM EST, Monday through Friday?

3. Can you create Excel-based financial reports and job costing documents from scratch?

4. Have you worked with Salesforce or Lead Perfection CRM systems before?

5. Do you have a professional home office with dependable internet access?

title: Creative Project Manager
description:
Overview



Phoenix is a full-service Web3 marketing agency driving growth and innovation for protocols, platforms, and communities in the decentralized space. We value creativity, speed, and building systems that scale. We're looking for a Creative Project Manager to own the day-to-day operations of our creative team, run production from kickoff to final QA, and build the processes that let a lean team punch above its weight.



This is a fully remote role. Working hours must overlap with U.S. timezones for real-time collaboration with the team and clients.



The Role



This is the operational backbone of our creative department. You won't just be tracking tasks, you'll be managing a team of designers and coordinators, owning the full lifecycle of 100+ creative requests per month, and building the systems that keep quality high while volume scales.



Reporting directly to Leadership / Co-Founder, you are the bridge between Account Management and the Creative team. You're responsible for making sure the creative vision translates into flawless output — on-brand, on-budget, and ahead of schedule — without burning out the people doing the work.



What Success Looks Like in 90 Days



- You've established a consistent QA process so nothing reaches a client without a review checkpoint.

- The creative team has clear daily priorities and a structured workflow — no one is guessing what to work on next.

- Revision rounds have decreased because briefs are tighter and feedback loops are faster.

- You've built a working rhythm with Account Management so requests flow cleanly into production without bottlenecks.

- The team sees you as their manager, not just a coordinator.



Responsibilities



Team Management & Creative Operations



- Directly manage the internal creative team — designers, coordinators, and junior contributors. This means assigning work, running 1:1s, giving feedback on output quality, unblocking people, and building a culture of accountability and craft.

- Act as the final Quality Assurance (QA) lead. Every deliverable gets reviewed against brand guidelines and technical specs before it reaches a client. You are the last line of defense.

- Own the daily workflow across 100+ monthly creative requests (client and internal). Prioritize, sequence, and keep the board moving so the team always knows what's next.

- Anticipate resource gaps and proactively manage scope expansion and change requests** to protect team bandwidth, timelines, and project profitability.



Process & Systems



- Architect and continuously improve creative workflows — from intake to delivery — so the team can handle growing volume without proportional headcount increases.

- Maintain detailed project roadmaps, milestones, and delivery schedules for multiple concurrent Web3 accounts.

- Evolve our internal tech stack (Notion, Figma, Adobe Creative Cloud) to automate repetitive tasks and improve reporting transparency.

- Manage third-party vendors or freelance contributors when needed, ensuring their work integrates seamlessly with internal standards.



Client Integration & Communication



- Serve as a point of contact for clients during the production phase when needed, translating complex feedback into clear, prioritized creative briefs.

- Navigate client feedback sessions — balancing client desires with creative integrity and production realities.

- Translate high-level client business goals into actionable, tiered project phases for the design and content teams.



 Qualifications



Required:



- 3–5 years of experience in a creative agency environment — specifically running creative operations, managing production workflows, and keeping high-volume output on track. You've done this at scale before.

- Figma proficiency — you can confidently navigate design files, collaborate within shared workspaces, manage structured feedback cycles between designers and stakeholders, and enforce file organization standards.

- People management experience — you've directly managed creative talent (designers, coordinators, or producers), not just managed projects alongside them.

- AI-assisted creative workflows — working familiarity with AI design tools, generative content tools, and automation in the creative process. You don't need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable integrating AI into ideation, production, and iteration cycles. This is a core part of how we work.

- High-volume operational comfort — you thrive managing 100+ requests per month across multiple accounts simultaneously, not 5 big campaigns per quarter.



Preferred:



- Design background or strong design sensibility — you can evaluate creative output with a trained eye, not just check boxes.

- Experience with Adobe Creative Cloud production workflows.

- Familiarity with Google Workspace and Notion for documentation, project tracking, and team collaboration.

- Understanding of the Web3 landscape (DeFi, NFTs, DAOs) and the pace of crypto-native creative cycles. This is preferred but not required. If you're a strong operator with agency experience, we can get you up to speed on Web3.



Soft Skills:



- Exceptional organizational instincts and the ability to maintain composure under the pressure of tight deadlines and shifting priorities.

- Strong negotiation skills — you can push back on unreasonable timelines while keeping relationships intact.

- Clear, direct communication. Our team coordinates primarily through
 — you should be comfortable in fast-moving async channels.



Details



- Location: Fully remote

- Schedule: U.S. timezone overlap required

- Reports to: Leadership / Co-Founder

- Team: You'll manage a creative team of designers and coordinators

title: Virtual Assistant (Impact.com Specialist)
description:
???? Elevate Your Career: Virtual Assistant & 
 Specialist



Are you a tech-savvy VA who loves mastering new platforms? Do you thrive when working side-by-side with leadership to build something from the ground up?

We are looking for a dedicated, proactive Virtual Assistant to join us Full-Time managing affiliate programs in 
. This isn't just a support role—it’s a growth track. You will start by co-piloting our expansion into

title: Paid Ads Team Member (Full Time)
description:
Paid Ads Tea
mber (Full Time)



Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key.



We are hiring a Full-Time Paid Ads Specialist with experience running
, Instagram, Google, and Amazon Ads. This is a long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role. You’ll be a key player in helping us scale ad campaigns for multiple brands across the martial arts and eCommerce industries.



In addition to ads management, we’re looking for someone with graphic design skills to help create ad creatives, landing page assets, and branded visuals.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Paid Ads Management



• Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns across:



• Meta 
 & Instagram)



• Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube)



• Amazon Ads (PPC, Sponsored Brands, Product Listings)



• Monitor KPIs daily and adjust targeting, budget, and creatives based on performance



• A/B test headlines, thumbnails, creative formats, landing pages, and offers



• Create custom audiences, retargeting flows, and conversion-focused funnels



• Provide weekly ad reports and campaign insights



2. Graphic Design & Creative Development



• Design static ads, social graphics, and promotional assets using Canva or Adobe Creative Suite



• Collaborate with our copywriters or marketing team to turn scripts or ideas into visuals



• Ensure all assets match brand guidelines and platform specifications



• Occasionally assist with mockups for new product launches or landing pages



3. Bonus Responsibilities (Optional but Valuable)



• Build landing pages (in GHL, Duda, or similar tools)



• Write ad copy for different platforms



• Help research competitors and gather swipe files for inspiration



Must-Have Experience With:



• Ads Platforms: Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Amazon Seller Central



• Design Tools: Canva, Adobe Photoshop or Illustrator



• Project Tools: ClickUp, Slack, Gmail



• Reporting: Google Sheets or Excel



• Understanding of Sales Funnels, Retargeting, and Audience Segmentation



What We’re Looking For



• Experience running paid ad campaigns for brands or agencies



• Strong graphic design eye — you don’t just place images; you think about performance



• Fluent in KPIs: CTR, ROAS, CPA, AOV, LTV



• Responsive communicator who meets deadlines



• Comfortable taking initiative, proposing new strategies, and evolving with platform changes



This is a full-time role with growth potential. As we scale, you could move into a more senior position — leading the creative strategy or managing a team. If you’re a results-driven thinker who enjoys both the creative and analytical side of ads, this is your chance to grow with a company that moves fast.



To ensure you’ve read this entire listing, please respond with the word “triangle” and include:



Your portfolio or examples of past ad campaigns and creatives



A list of platforms and tools you’ve used



Any certifications (Meta, Google, etc. are a plus)

title: AI and Computer Programer (Full Time)
description:
AI & Computer Programer (Full Time)



Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key.



I’m looking for a proactive, AI-literate operator to help us stay ahead of the curve by leveraging AI tools to create content, automate tasks, and improve business efficiency. This is a full-time role with serious growth potential. You must be someone who constantly experiments with new tools and loves turning innovation into systems.



Our agency specializes in marketing and business support for martial arts schools, eCommerce brands, and service providers — and we are increasingly building AI into our workflows. You’ll work closely with me to implement AI across content, automation, lead nurturing, and backend operations.



Key Responsibilities



• AI-Powered Video Creation



• Use tools like Veo 3, Runway, Pika, or Sora to create short-form AI videos for ads, social content, and storytelling



• Assist in turning briefs or written concepts into visual content using AI tools



• Add text, captions, voiceovers, and music to finalize AI video assets



• Manage content delivery across multiple platforms: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.



Business Optimization Through AI



• Identify ways to streamline internal operations using AI (e.g., lead routing, onboarding, reporting)



• Set up workflows using tools like Zapier, Make (Integromat), or GoHighLevel automations



• Help automate tasks like
 responses, meeting scheduling, proposal generation, client reporting, etc.



• Research and test new AI tools as they’re released — bring us the best of what’s new



• Document repeatable processes and systems as we scale



AI Content & Communications



• Use ChatGPT or other LLMs to help write
s, blog drafts, sales scripts, and FAQs



• Generate creative briefs, outlines, or newsletters using AI



• Help brainstorm and test new content strategies across channels



Must-Have Experience With Some of These Tools:



• AI Content & Automation Tools:



• Veo 3, Runway, Pika, Kaiber, Sora



• ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, Copy.ai



• Zapier, Make (Integromat), GoHighLevel workflows



• Google Sheets + AI formulas/macros



• Notion AI, Airtable AI (bonus)



Marketing + Design Stack:

• Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, YouTube Studio



• Slack, ClickUp, Gmail



• Shopify or Amazon (bonus if you understand eCommerce workflows)



What We’re Looking For:



• A genuine passion for AI and emerging tech — you keep up with releases



• Someone who thinks in systems and is always looking for what can be automated



• Excellent communication skills — you can simplify complexity and write clearly



• Strong attention to detail and the ability to turn ideas into structured workflows



• Self-sufficient and proactive: you don’t wait to be told what to fix — you spot it and do it



This role is full-time. If you’re good, you’ll grow with us. You’ll be helping lead the AI side of the company — not just following checklists.



To ensure you’ve read this entire listing, please reply with the word “triangle” and share a list of the AI tools you are most comfortable with. If you’re really about this life, also tell me one brand or business you think is doing something innovative with AI right now.

title: Sales and Operation assistant (remote)
description:
Job Overview: We are a growing custom printed packaging company based in Vancouver, BC Canada, seeking a remote Sales & Operations Assistant with mandatory prior experience in the printing and packaging industry (Do not apply if you have zero experience in this industry). This is a critical requirement and applicants without this background will not be considered. The ideal candidate will have proven executive assistant experience and a solid background in procurement, with the ability to support the CEO and sales team by coordinating projects, managing vendor communications, handling sourcing and order follow-ups, and ensuring smooth operations in our business serving clients in the food and beverage industry, CPG brands, retail product businesses, and medical sectors.



Your role in the organization will include the following:



Organizational Support:

Provide high-level administrative support to the executive, including managing schedules, coordinating departments,  and handling correspondence.

Organize internal systems, files and documents for optimal information flow, ensuring accuracy and efficient business productivity.

Manage business
s, phone calls, and other communications, filtering and prioritizing messages as needed. Ensuring urgent messages are flagged for immediate attention and drafting responses to routine inquiries.

Help resolve issues and challenges by identifying solutions and taking appropriate action.

Taking initiatives to improve SOP to ensure efficient business functionality and productivity.



Interdepartmental support:

Perform data entry and maintain an effective electronic filing system.

Coordinating team functions by interpreting messages.

Collaborate effectively with various departments or teams through virtual meetings and communication tools.

Maintain organized records of documentation and reporting daily/weekly/monthly.

Draft and send quotes promptly and accurately to support sales functions.

Assist with miscellaneous and complex priorities.



Vendor support and coordination:

Act as a liaison, to facilitate efficient communication with vendors, answering inquiries and assisting with needs, demonstrating exceptional judgment in problem-solving.

Coordinate functions like production, shipping and logistics.

Review and approve purchase orders and procurement requests.

Evaluate and select suppliers and manage vendor relationships virtually.

Collaborate with suppliers to resolve issues and optimize partnerships.

Maintain relationships with external vendors to ensure smooth communication.





Qualifications:

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills that allow you to articulate vital information to different audiences

- Excellent interpersonal skills that enables you to develop strong relationships with others

- Fluent in English with a professional communication style.

- Clear, professional phone presence.

- Ability to listen, interpret messages, and execute tasks effectively.

- Strong organizational abilities and meticulous attention to detail.

- Solutions-oriented, accountable, and self-motivated.

- Professional with business maturity and a positive attitude.

- Proficiency in Excel functions, Google Workspace and Microsoft Office Suite.

- Familiarity with ERP type system - Zoho Books / Analytics / BIGIN

- Familiarity with the sales cycle and an understanding of sales strategies and techniques.

- Minimum of 5 years full-time experience as an Executive Assistant. Proven experience in Procurement or in a similar role,

- Must have proven experience in the custom printed packaging industry, including solid knowledge of the printed packaging and practical use of various packaging types.

- Technical knowledge related to procurement, printing materials and production processes, is highly desirable.





Hours and Compensation:

- Working hours:  11 AM to 11 PM (include 1-hour unpaid break to be determined mutually), Monday through Friday (PST TIME, Vancouver BC, Canada). Excluding certain BC / PH statutory Holidays. Salary is paid biweekly via WISE. 

- Training will be provided in only specific areas depending on what the candidate is not familiar with. 

- After completing one year of service with us, tea
mbers become entitled to compensation for National holidays at their current hourly rate.



Application Process:

Applicants are required to include a cover letter, resume, and any relevant work samples and references.

Submissions lacking a cover letter or resume will not be considered.

In your cover letter, please elaborate on your relevant experiences within this industry and express your motivations for joining our team.

*Note: We appreciate all applications, but only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

title: Commission Inquiry Coordinator
description:
JOB TITLE: Commission Inquiry Coordinator

REPORTS TO: Director, Revenue Operations



The Commission Inquiry Coordinator plays a critical support role on the Revenue Assurance team, ensuring that open commission inquiries are actively monitored, accurately documented, and promptly communicated. This role is ideal for a highly organized, detail-oriented individual who thrives on process and consistency. By owning the operational upkeep of inquiry tickets, the Coordinator frees the commissions analyst team to focus on high-value analytical and partner-facing work.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES (PH-tailored)



-Monitor the commissions inquiry inbox on a set cadence aligned to US business hours (night shift PH time), triaging updates from distributors (TSDs) and suppliers per SOP.

-Log and update partner-facing tickets in the internal CRM/ticketing tool (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot) with clear notes, correct statuses, and time stamps to meet SLAs.

-Check TSD and supplier portals bi-weekly (or as required), capture evidence (screenshots/files), and document findings in the ticket and tracker.

-Send timely follow-ups to TSDs and suppliers on overdue inquiries; escalate per escalation matrix when response SLAs are missed.

-Recognize issues needing analytical review or partner communication and hand off to the assigned commissions analyst with complete context and attachments.

-Maintain audit-ready records and data integrity across ticketing, spreadsheets, and commission systems; manage file versions in Google Drive/SharePoint.

-Assist with shared inbox management (labels, rules, routing) to direct inquiries to the correct analyst or queue and flag urgent items.

-Prepare and maintain trackers and weekly status reports (volume, aging, response times, resolutions) for the Revenue Operations team.

-Support month-end/quarter-end activities, including bulk ticket updates, portal sweeps, and meeting cut-off timelines.

-Contribute to process documentation and continuous improvement; update SOPs/checklists when changes are implemented.

-Ensure compliance with data privacy and confidentiality requirements (company policies, GDPR/CCPA where applicable).

-Provide clear end-of-shift handovers to ensure continuity between PH and US teams.



QUALIFICATIONS :



-Bachelor’s degree preferred; alternatively, 2+ years of BPO/back-office or
 support experience in operations, billing, finance ops, order management, or similar.

-Strong attention to detail and data accuracy; proven track record handling high-volume, repetitive tasks with minimal errors.

-Excellent written and professional English; comfortable communicating with US-based stakeholders and external vendors.

-Proficiency in Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel (filters, lookups/VLOOKUP or XLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting, data validation).

-Experience with ticketing/CRM systems (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot); Jira or ServiceNow is a plus.

-Ability to follow defined SOPs, meet SLAs, and appropriately flag exceptions/escalations.

-Comfortable working across multiple systems and supplier portals simultaneously; fast learner with strong keyboard skills (e.g., 45+ WPM with high accuracy).

-Strong organizational and time-management skills; skilled in maintaining trackers and clear documentation.

-Willing and able to work night shifts aligned to US time zones, including select Philippine holidays and month-end/quarter-end overtime when needed.

-Reliable remote setup (e.g., at least 25 Mbps internet, backup connectivity/power, quiet workspace); or openness to onsite/hybrid as required by the company.

-Familiarity with handling sensitive financial or commission data and adherence to confidentiality/data privacy policies.

-Nice to have: experience in telecom or IT channel environments, revenue assurance, commissions or billing support, and vendor/partner communications.



If you feel you meet the qualifications above, please send your resume to 
 with a cover letter stating why you are the best candidate. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. We will ONLY reach out to qualified candidates. Thank you.

title: Social Media Growth Manager
description:
IMPORTANT: You must reply to each of our 4 questions to be considered.



Also, your application MUST include a direct link to ONE YouTube channel you personally managed. Include the subscriber count when you started and what you grew it to.



Applications without this specific link and these specific numbers will be deleted.



We’ve received many AI-generated replies that copy our job description back to us. Those get deleted immediately. If that's the kind of effort you put into a reply to a long-term position, then that's the effort we assume you would put into the job.



We’re hiring a social media manager, not an agency and not a general VA.



How to apply:



In your response, include:

1. A link to at least one YouTube channel you personally grew, with the subscriber count when you started vs. now

2. Links to any TikTok or Instagram accounts you grew, with follower counts before and after your involvement

3. How you personally grow these channels, your actual strategy, not a list of buzzwords

4. Confirmation that you handle video editing and posting yourself



This job is NOT for you if:

- Your only experience is on smaller YT accounts with less than 25K subscribers, IG accounts with less than 25K followers, or TT accounts with less than 100K followers

- You’re not a geek about algorithms and performance metrics

- You rely on scheduling tools as a growth strategy

- You cannot provide links to specific accounts you’ve grown



This job IS for you if you can:

- Take our raw video content and edit it for YouTube, long-form and Shorts, Instagram, and TikTok

- Edit, post, and optimize for channel growth

- Stay current on platform algorithms and growth strategies

- Be proactive with studying and testing hooks, pacing, captions, and formats

- Maintain strict brand consistency in messaging, tone, colors, and wording

- Meet weekly with the content host



Core responsibilities:



Research: Study top-performing creators and content in our niche. Track what is working and why.



Script Support: Help determine the best marketing hooks and topics based on your research in our industry.



Edit and Upload: Edit videos and publish content across all platforms to maximize reach, retention, and growth.



Requirements:

- 1+ years hands-on experience growing video-based social accounts

- Proven understanding of YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok algorithms

- Strong video editing skills focused on hooks and retention

- Fluent English

- Available during EST hours



This is a secure, long-term role for the right person.

title: Residential Architect
description:
Position: Residential Architect - Philippines

Reports to: Director of Design

Schedule:

JRH Engineering & Environmental Services Inc. is headquartered in Houston, TX, United States and works a Monday – Friday, 8:00am – 5:00pm (UTC-5, Central Standard Time) schedule. It is imperative that all tea
mbers follow this schedule due to JRH Engineering clients being located in the Central Standard Time zone in the United States. JRH Engineering has specific project schedules with deadlines that need to be met and requires efforts from our staff to ensure that we meet our clients' expectations.



General Summary



The Residential Architect plays a critical role in the design and delivery of residential projects for JRH Engineering. The position is responsible for producing high-quality architectural drawings, construction documents, and design solutions that meet client expectations, local building codes, and project timelines. The Residential Architect collaborates closely with the engineering team, project managers, and clients to ensure that all deliverables reflect JRH Engineering's commitment to excellence.



Job Description:



The Residential Architect position will be responsible for the following tasks:

Develop architectural designs and construction documents for residential projects

Produce floor plans, elevations, sections, and detail drawings

Prepare specifications, schedules, and design narratives

Ensure all designs comply with applicable building codes, zoning ordinances, and HOA requirements

Coordinate with the civil engineering team on site planning and infrastructure

Collaborate on grading, drainage, utility layouts, and site access

Resolve design conflicts between architectural and civil/structural elements

Manage project documentation and design revisions throughout all project phases

Maintain organized drawing sets and version control

Track and incorporate client and jurisdictional review comments

Support the permitting and entitlement process

Prepare permit submittal packages for applicable US jurisdictions

Respond to plan check comments and coordinate with reviewing agencies

Provide Quality Assurance and Quality Control on all assigned projects

Review drawings for accuracy, completeness, and code compliance before submission

Identify and resolve design discrepancies early in the project lifecycle

Communicate project status, design challenges, and schedule impacts to the Director of Design

Support client interactions and design presentations as requested

Prepare visual materials (renderings, diagrams) to facilitate client understanding

Other tasks as requested by the leadership team



Qualifications



Minimum of 3 – 5 years of experience in residential architecture

Bachelor's or Master's degree in Architecture from an accredited institution

Licensed Architect (or actively pursuing licensure) preferred

Proficiency in AutoCAD and/or Revit; experience with SketchUp or other visualization tools is a plus

Working knowledge of US residential building codes (IRC), zoning regulations, and permitting processes

Strong technical drawing skills with a high attention to detail

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines

Experience working with US-based clients or on US residential projects is strongly preferred

Self-motivated and capable of working independently in a remote environment while collaborating with a distributed team

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant — Etsy & Shopify Shop (Home Décor & Meaningful Gifts)
description:
About the shop



We are a growing Etsy shop — expanding to Shopify — specializing in print-on-demand home décor, baby blankets, throws, table runners, travel accessories, and wrapping paper. Our brand is rooted in timeless Southern coastal elegance: refined, heirloom-inspired, and deeply meaningful. Everything we create is designed to be cherished, gifted, and treasured. We work with POD suppliers including Printify, Casestry, and Pic The Gift, and create all graphics in Adobe Creative Suite.



About this role



We are looking for a warm, detail-oriented virtual assistant whose primary focus will be managing and growing our social media presence on Pinterest, Instagram, and
 — including designing Pinterest pins that convert. You will also support customer service, order tracking, and the early stages of building our
 list.



This is a growth role, not just a support role. We measure success not only by tasks completed, but by the impact on our shop's visibility, traffic, and sales. The right person will take genuine ownership of our social presence, treat Pinterest as a traffic engine, and care deeply about whether their work is actually moving the needle. We will review key metrics together each week and celebrate growth as a team. 

This is a long-term role with real opportunity to grow as the business does. You will be a trusted representative of a brand that takes great care in quality, consistency, and gracious customer communication.



Primary responsibilities



•Design Pinterest pins that are on-brand and optimized for engagement and click-through — vertical format, lifestyle-styled, with elegant text overlays

•Post and schedule content daily across Pinterest, Instagram, and
 using 
-approved captions and imagery

•Engage thoughtfully with followers and comments in a warm, on-brand tone

•Monitor Pinterest analytics and Instagram insights; provide a simple weekly summary with observations on what is performing and what to adjust 

•Assist with growing and maintaining an
 list (platform TBD — experience with Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or Flodesk a plus)



Supporting responsibilities



•Monitor and respond to Etsy customer messages using provided templates and brand voice guidelines

•Track orders daily across Printify, Caseistry, and Pic The Gift; flag issues before production

•Maintain a simple order tracking log in Google Sheets

•Flag any customer complaints or production issues to the shop owner immediately



What we are looking for



•Strong written English — warm, clear, and polished in every message

•Proven experience designing Pinterest pins for a product-based or lifestyle brand — please include examples or a portfolio link in your application

•Understands what makes a Pinterest pin convert: lifestyle staging, emotional headline copy, clean vertical layouts, and warm color palettes — not just pretty graphics

•Proven experience managing Instagram, Pinterest, and
 for a product-based business

•Understands that social media for a product-based business is ultimately about driving traffic and sales — not just posting consistently. Can speak to results they have driven, not just tasks they have completed

•Comfortable being measured on growth metrics — Pinterest outbound clicks, Etsy shop visits, and orders — and willing to adjust strategy based on what the numbers show

•Comfortable working with Adobe Creative Suite files and designing within an established brand system

•Experience with Etsy, Shopify, or print-on-demand platforms preferred

•Reliable, self-directed, and genuinely detail-oriented

•Able to follow detailed SOPs and brand guidelines with care and consistency

•Familiarity with
 marketing platforms (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or Flodesk) is a welcome plus



How we measure success



We will track the following metrics together from week one:



Pinterest outbound clicks — week over week

Etsy shop visits — week over week

Orders placed — compared to baseline before this role began

 list growth — monthly

Instagram follower growth — monthly

At 30, 60, and 90 days we will review these numbers together. Growth does not have to be dramatic — it needs to be consistent and directionally right. We are building something lasting, and we want someone who wants to build it with us.



Tools you will use



Adobe Express (pin design), Pinterest Analytics, Instagram Insights, Pinterest, Instagram,
, Google Sheets, Google Drive,  Etsy Seller Dashboard



What you will receive



•Detailed SOPs, a Pinterest design brief, and brand voice training documents provided from day one

•Clear brand assets, color palettes, and font guidelines — no guesswork on the look and feel

•Consistent part-time hours with a stable, long-term opportunity

•A collaborative, kind, and supportive working relationship built on transparency and mutual respect

•Weekly metric reviews so you always know how your work is performing and where to focus

•Opportunity to grow your hours and responsibilities as the business grows — this role is designed to expand





**To apply, please send a short message that includes: (1) your experience managing social media for a product-based or e-commerce business; (2) examples of Pinterest pins you have designed — links, a portfolio, or screenshots are all welcome; (3) a sample caption written in a refined, warm, heirloom-inspired tone for a baby blanket or table runner — this carries significant weight in our decision; (4) one example of a result you drove for a previous client — traffic growth, follower increase, or sales impact; and (5) your available hours per week and time zone. Applications without both a writing sample and design examples will not be considered.

title: Client-Facing Senior Accountant - Work From Home
description:
You're not just looking for a job—you're looking to make a real difference. You've been in roles that challenge your skills, but something's missing: impact. What if there was a career where you could excel professionally while making a meaningful contribution to the world?



Join our mission-driven team at The Cashflow Doctor, where your accounting expertise directly supports fast-growth founders AND helps orphanages in Mexico thrive.



The Role

As our Senior Accountant, you'll be the strategic accounting partner for small businesses, agencies, and tech startups in a fast-paced, fully remote environment. This is a leadership role where you'll oversee client work, mentor tea
mbers, and ensure exceptional deliverables—all from the comfort of your home office.



Job Requirements:

- CPA with 5+ years of experience in QuickBooks Online (MUST be CPA)

- Natural leader with proven ability to oversee and guide others

- Exceptional at leading client meetings via Zoom with confidence and a Western native tone

- Available to work US Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours

- Strong track record collaborating with US-based clients

- Advanced Excel and accounting software skills

- Detail-oriented, accurate, and timely



Responsibilities:

- Client-Facing Accounting

- Deliver clean, accurate, timely bookkeeping (GAAP or cash basis)

- Lead Zoo
etings with clients, presenting financials and strategic recommendations

- Oversee and review peers' work to ensure quality standards

- Communicate with clients via Slack,
, and Zoom about financials, A/R, A/P, payroll, billings

- Create impactful spreadsheets for forecasts, budgets, and expansion planning

- Leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to streamline processes

- Identify improvements and efficiencies—think strategically, not just transactionally

- Take ownership of client relationships and team deliverables

- Provide high-level reporting to management



Your First 90 Days:

30 Days: Master our systems (
, Slack, Ignition, QuickBooks), complete training videos, handle client reconciliations on time, and build relationships across Accounting and Tax teams.



60 Days: Analyze client accounts to identify gaps and optimization opportunities, work independently with confidence, begin leading client presentations and reviewing peers' work, and select an orphanage or child-related cause to champion.



Who You Are:

You're detail-oriented yet strategic, friendly yet firm. You're a natural leader who inspires accountability. You thrive on solving problems, building clarity through data, and presenting complex information clearly on video calls. You love learning new systems and improving processes. You're a CPA with 5+ solid years of client-facing experience in fast-paced remote environments, and you're excited to collaborate with a global team during California business hours.



Why You'll Love Working With Us:

- Work From Home: Fully remote position—work from anywhere with reliable internet

- USA PST Hours: Collaborate with US clients during California business hours

- Low-Stress Culture: Healthy workloads and realistic expectations

- Flexible Fridays: Set your own 8-hour schedule every Friday

- 15 Days PTO Annually: Plus your birthday as a paid holiday

- End-of-Year Bonuses: Your hard work is rewarded

- Celebrations: Work anniversaries honored with personalized gifts

- Supportive Team: A culture that celebrates wins and fosters growth

- Mission-Driven: Support orphanages and build homes in Mexico

- Professional Development: Training, mentorship, and leadership opportunities



About Us

The Cashflow Doctor helps fast-growth founders scale through smart accounting and tax strategies, leveraging technology to save time and money. Giving back is core to who we are—our founder serves on the board of a nonprofit orphanage and a homebuilding organization in Mexico.



Ready to Apply?

We hire based on accomplishments and cultural fit. Submit your application and thoughtfully answer our assessment questions:



Please fill out the application form:

title: Affirmation Script Writer (Part-Time) (female)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a creative and emotionally intuitive scriptwriter to write calming, high-quality affirmation scripts in English for a new audio channel.



The content is designed to help listeners relax, feel grounded, and improve their mindset throughout the day.



Responsibilities



Write 5 affirmation scripts per week

Each script should be 15–30 minutes in spoken length

Maintain a calm, slow, repetitive, and soothing tone

Structure scripts so they can be looped seamlessly

Research and adapt high-performing affirmation topics

Match the tone and style of leading affirmation creators (references will be provided)



Ideal Candidate



Strong English writing skills (native or near-native)

Experience with affirmation writing, meditation, mindfulness, or similar content

Ability to write in a gentle, flowing, emotionally supportive style

Good sense of pacing and tone

Bonus: background in psychology, coaching, or self-development



Workload and Pay



Approximately 5 hours per week

$2.45 per hour

Long-term position



To Apply

Please include:



A short introduction

A sample affirmation script (1–2 minutes) written by you

Topic: “Calm and Letting Go”

Note: Clearly copy and pasted AI texts will not be considered



Important

This is not blog writing or SEO writing. We are looking for someone who can write calming, emotionally engaging audio scripts.

title: Audio Editor / Sound Designer (Affirmation Channel)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a skilled audio editor to create high-quality, calming audio experiences for an affirmation-based channel.



Your role is to transform raw voice recordings into immersive, “dreamy” audio tracks suitable for long listening sessions (2–3 hours).



Responsibilities



Clean raw voice recordings (remove noise, breaths, and distractions naturally)

Smooth pauses and improve pacing

Apply soft, calming reverb and spatial effects

Mix and balance background music (provided)

Create a consistent and relaxing sound experience

Prepare final audio files optimized for long-form looping (2–3 hours)



Ideal Candidate



Experience with voice editing, podcast editing, or meditation audio

Skilled in tools such as Adobe Audition, Audacity, Logic Pro, or similar

Strong understanding of noise reduction, EQ, compression, and reverb

High attention to detail (no harsh cuts or distracting artifacts)

Bonus: experience with ASMR or meditation audio



Workload and Pay



Approximately 5 hours per week

$2.45 per hour

Long-term position



To Apply

Please include:



A short introduction

Links to previous audio work (required)

Optional: before/after audio samples



Important

This is not basic audio trimming. We are looking for someone who can create a high-quality, calming listening experience.

title: Architectural Rendering Assistant – Color Renderings for Metal Building Drawings
description:
About Us



We are a U.S.-based pre-engineered metal building company creating custom building quotes for customers across the country. We need a reliable rendering assistant who can turn our wireframe building drawings into clean, realistic colored concept renderings for customer presentations.



These are not full architectural designs — they are customer-facing visual mockups based on wireframe drawing.



Job Description



We are looking for a detail-oriented freelancer who can create color renderings from black-and-white wireframe building drawings.



You will receive:



Wireframe PDF drawing

Color specifications (roof, wall, trim colors)



You will create:



Realistic colored exterior renderings of metal buildings Exterior only and only one view.

Accurate renderings matching the actual building geometry



Typical Projects Include:

Pre-engineered metal buildings

Warehouses

Garages

Shops

Barn-style buildings

Multi-building connected structures

Buildings with porches, canopies, lean-tos

Required Skills:



? Experience with architectural rendering software

? Ability to accurately follow wireframe building geometry

? Experience with one or more:



SketchUp

Lumion

Twinmotion

Revit rendering tools

AI rendering software (Rendair, mnml.ai, Veras, etc.)

These do not have to be exact, this is only for conceptual presentation



Important:



This role requires accuracy.

We are NOT looking for artistic reinterpretations.

We need renderings that match the actual building drawings as closely as possible.



Deliverables:



For each project:



One high-quality exterior colored rendering (JPG or PNG)



Fast turnaround preferred (24–Hours / 

Workload:

Part-time freelance

Project-based

Ongoing steady work possible



Please include:

Per-render price

Estimated turnaround time per rendering

To Apply:



Please send:



Portfolio samples of architectural/building renderings

Software you use

Your experience with metal building or architectural rendering

Answer this question:



How would you turn a black-and-white wireframe metal building drawing into an accurate customer-ready color rendering?



Test Assignment:



Qualified applicants will be asked to complete one paid test rendering from a sample building drawing.



Ideal Candidate:



Someone who is:



Reliable

Communicates clearly

Meets deadlines

Can become a long-term rendering partner

Turn around needs to be quick.  We will send this with our Bid or quote that goes out to the customer

title: Remote Administrative Assistant – Health Coach Support (Full-Time)
description:
Remote Administrative Assistant – Health Coach Support (Full-Time)

About the Role

We are a U.S.-based healthcare services company seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Remote Administrative Assistant to support our client care programs. This role involves conducting structured client calls, managing documentation, generating reports, and supporting compliance-related processes.

This is not a basic data entry role. The position requires strong communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to follow structured workflows consistently.



Work Schedule

Monday – Friday

8:30 AM – 4:30 PM EST

Full-time (40 hours per week)



Key Responsibilities

Client Calls (Health Coaching Support)

Conduct monthly calls with clients using structured scripts

Communicate in a clear, patient, and professional manner

Accurately document call details and outcomes after each interaction

Reporting and Documentation

Assist with monthly and quarterly reports

Organize and summarize data from client calls

Ensure all documentation is accurate and submitted on time

Client File Management

Maintain organized and up-to-date client records

Ensure all files are complete and properly stored

Handle confidential information with professionalism

Administrative Support

Support daily operations through organization and consistency

Strong verbal and written English communication skills

High attention to detail and ability to follow processes

Strong organizational and time management skills

Proficiency in Microsoft Office or Google Workspace

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Compensation

$1,200 – $1,500 USD per month, based on experience and performance

Long-term, stable opportunity



How to Apply

Subject Line:

   How would you handle a client who says they are not feeling well and does not want to talk?

title: Procurement and Sales Support Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated, organized, and detail-oriented individual to join our team as a Procurement and Sales Assistant. In this role, you will support both our procurement and sales functions by helping manage supplier communication, quotations, order coordination, lead follow-up, and day-to-day administrative support for the management team.



This position is ideal for someone who is proactive, resourceful, and confident communicating with both suppliers and potential customers. You must be able to work effectively in a remote environment, stay highly organized, and contribute to both cost-efficient procurement and sales growth.



Your primary responsibilities will include handling supplier quotations, coordinating shipping and production updates, supporting sales outreach, following up with leads, assisting with customer quotations, and ensuring smooth communication with our management team.



Key Responsibilities

Procurement Responsibilities



Procurement Strategy



Assist in implementing procurement strategies aligned with company goals, including sourcing, cost-saving initiatives, and supplier evaluation.

Research, evaluate, and communicate with suppliers to identify the best options based on price, quality, and lead time.

Support management in comparing vendor quotations and making purchasing decisions.



Purchase Management



Assist in the procurement of goods and services, ensuring timely and cost-effective purchases.

Prepare, review, and organize purchase orders, supplier quotations, and procurement requests.

Monitor order progress and follow up with suppliers on production timelines and delivery schedules.



Cost Control



Monitor procurement expenses and identify opportunities for cost savings.

Help ensure competitive pricing without compromising quality or service.

Maintain accurate costing records for management review.



Supplier Management



Communicate regularly with vendors regarding quotations, production, timelines, shipping, and issue resolution.

Build and maintain professional supplier relationships.

Coordinate supplier communication related to production, shipping, and logistics.



Quality Assurance



Help ensure purchased items meet required quality standards.

Coordinate with suppliers to resolve quality-related concerns, damages, delays, or discrepancies.

Escalate issues promptly to management when needed.



Documentation and Reporting



Create work dockets and maintain organized procurement records.

Track invoices, purchase details, shipping updates, and supplier communications.

Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly executive summary reports.

Sales Assistant Responsibilities



Sales Support



Assist the sales team with preparing quotations, proposals, and customer follow-up communications.

Support inbound and outbound sales activity by helping move leads through the pipeline efficiently.

Coordinate with management to ensure sales opportunities are followed up on in a timely manner.

Help prepare information, pricing, and product details for customer inquiries.



Lead Generation and Prospecting



Research target markets, industries, and potential customers to identify qualified leads.

Build and maintain organized lead lists for outreach campaigns.

Support prospecting efforts through
 outreach, cold calling, and follow-up activity.



Outbound Outreach



Initiate contact with potential clients through calls and
s to introduce our products and services.

Tailor outreach messages based on industry, packaging type, and customer needs.

Represent the company professionally and communicate our value clearly.



Customer Communication



Respond to inquiries from prospective customers promptly and professionally.

Listen carefully to customer requirements and communicate relevant information to the sales or management team.

Follow up with leads and customers to maintain 
ntum and improve conversion opportunities.



Quote and Order Coordination



Assist with preparing and sending customer quotations based on management direction.

Follow up on quotations and help track open opportunities.

Coordinate internally between sales, procurement, and management to support smooth execution after orders are confirmed.



CRM and Pipeline Management



Keep lead, customer, quotation, and follow-up records organized and up to date.

Track sales activities, quote status, and customer interactions accurately.

Help management maintain visibility over the sales pipeline and pending opportunities.

Remote Collaboration

Collaborate effectively with management and tea
mbers through virtual meetings and communication tools.

Support cross-functional coordination between procurement, sales, shipping, and operations.

Listen carefully, interpret instructions accurately, and execute tasks efficiently.

Qualifications

Strong understanding of sourcing, quotations, and vendor communication for consumable products.

Strong knowledge of packaging products, especially flexible packaging and food and beverage packaging, is preferred.

Experience in procurement, sales support, lead generation, customer service, or administrative support.

Experience with cold calling,
 outreach, lead follow-up, or quotation support is a strong asset.

Executive assistant experience is an asset.

Proficiency in Excel, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Office.

Strong written and verbal English communication skills.

Strong organizational skills with a high level of attention to detail.

Self-motivated, dependable, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

Able to manage multiple priorities and follow through consistently.

Working Hours



Working hours are Monday through Friday, 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM PST, excluding National holidays, with an unpaid one-hour break.



National holidays will be determined collaboratively between tea
mbers and the employer. Training will be provided.



Compensation and Benefits

Payment is made twice a month via WISE.

After completing one year of service, tea
mbers become entitled to compensation for National holidays at their current hourly rate.

Tea
mbers are also eligible for a performance-based year-end bonus.

Application Instructions



Applicants are kindly requested to submit both a cover letter and resume with their application. Applications missing either document will not be considered.



In your cover letter, please explain:



Your relevant experience in procurement, sales support, lead generation, or packaging

Your experience working remotely

Why you are interested in joining our team



We appreciate all applicants; however, only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

title: GoHighLevel Expert (Full Time)
description:
GoHighLevel Expert (Full Time)



Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key.



We are hiring a Full-Time GoHighLevel Expert with proven experience building, managing, and automating marketing systems inside GoHighLevel (GHL). This is a long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role. You’ll be a key player in helping us scale automation, CRM systems, pipelines, and campaign workflows for multiple brands across the martial arts and broader business sectors.



In addition to technical GHL mastery, we’re looking for someone who understands funnel strategy, automation logic, and can confidently bridge marketing and operations inside a single platform.



Key Responsibilities:

1. GoHighLevel Management & Automation



• Build, optimize, and maintain GoHighLevel accounts and sub-accounts

• Create automations, workflows, and pipelines for lead management and sales tracking

• Set up triggers, tags, and conditional logic for streamlined CRM and marketing processes

• Design and launch
/SMS drip campaigns, appointment reminders, and follow-up sequences

• Manage integrations with tools such as Zapier, Slack, Google Sheets, and Meta Lead Forms

• Create and manage dashboards, reports, and analytics inside GHL



2. Funnel & Campaign Development



• Build conversion-focused funnels using GHL’s funnel builder

• Connect forms, calendars, and automations to ensure smooth user flow

• Implement tracking, conversion pixels, and custom UTM parameters

• Collaborate with our marketing team to align offers, landing pages, and ad campaigns

• Conduct A/B testing to optimize page design, copy, and user experience



3. Bonus Skills (Optional but Valuable)



• Knowledge of paid ads (Meta, Google, or YouTube) and how to integrate tracking into GHL

• Basic graphic design skills for funnel visuals (Canva, Photoshop, or Figma)

• Copywriting or
 marketing experience

• Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, or Make (Integromat) for advanced automation



Must-Have Experience With:



• GoHighLevel (CRM, Automations, Pipelines, Funnels, Forms, Calendars, and Reporting)

•
 & SMS Marketing: Campaign setup, deliverability, and compliance

What We’re Looking For:

• Strong grasp of marketing strategy and client lifecycle (from lead to retention)

• Analytical thinker who understands how data flows between tools

• Responsive communicator who meets deadlines and solves problems proactively

• Comfortable taking initiative and evolving with platform updates



This is a full-time role with long-term growth potential. As we scale, you could move into a senior position — overseeing automation strategy or leading system development for client accounts. If you’re a tech-savvy, detail-oriented problem solver who enjoys creating smooth, automated systems that drive real results, this is your opportunity to grow with a company that moves fast.



To confirm you’ve read this entire listing, please respond with the word “triangle” and include:

title: Inside Phone Sales
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a motivated and personable individual to join our team as a Follow-Up and Inside Sales Rep. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys connecting with people, educating them about services, and closing deals over the phone. If you have strong communication skills, a sales-oriented mindset, and are looking for a long-term opportunity, we’d love to hear from you!



Job Responsibilities:



-Make follow-up calls to leads and current clients, closing deals effectively.

-Answer incoming calls, guide leads through a provided script, and educate them about our services.

-Ask for the sale confidently while maintaining professionalism.

-Maintain accurate and organized records of client interactions and sales.



Work Schedule:



Work Days: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday.

Days Off: Saturday and Sunday.

Hours: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST. (Manilla PST 9:00pm - 5:00am)



Compensation and Benefits:



Hourly Rate: $6 USD per hour.

Commission: $5-10 USD for every service you successfully sell or close over the phone (new leads or existing clients).



Paid Time Off:



-9 days off throughout the year (5 are paid).

-1 week of paid vacation.

-Unpaid Time Off: 1 week unpaid between Christmas and New Year’s Day.



Requirements:



Strong English communication skills (spoken and written).

Experience in sales and/or customer service is highly preferred.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment.

Ability to follow a script while maintaining a conversational and engaging tone.

Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and results-driven.





To qualify for an interview:



"Hi, I'm Rob, let me introduce myself. Watch this video to learn how to apply"







**Create a recording on Loom (video optional) introducing yourself and reading the provided script below.

Submit your recording along with your application.



Representative: "Hambleton Lawn and Landscape. This is (Name) speaking, how can I help you?"

Lead: "Hi, I’m calling to get a quote for lawn mowing."

Representative: "Perfect, I can certainly help with that! We have a convenient way to generate a quick quote. Would you like to get started?"

Lead: "Yes."

Representative:

"Great! Can I start by getting your name, please?

And your address?

And your zip code?"

Representative:

"Thank you! I’m just going to pull up your address and get some measurements…

Okay, I have it. Here’s what’s included in our service:

Mowing of the entire lawn

Weed whipping and trimming around all obstacles and along the edges of your home

Blowing all debris off hard surfaces

Now, this service is normally $78 per visit. However, I see you're close to some of our other clients, so I can offer you proximity pricing and bring that down to $54 per service. Does that sound good?"

Lead: "That sounds great. How does the billing work?"

Representative:

"We’ve set up a billing system to make things as easy as possible for you—completely pain-free and thought-free. Would you like me to add you to our schedule?"

Lead: "I need to talk to my spouse."

Representative:

"Totally understand! Here’s what I’ll do: to lock in the price and secure your place, I can add you to our schedule and collect your payment information now. If, after speaking with your spouse, she d
 it’s not the right fit, you can call us to cancel. We don’t have any contracts, so you’re not tied to anything."

Lead: "When would the service start?"

Representative:

"Our next service day for your area is Thursday, so just let us know before then if you choose not to proceed. Otherwise, consider it done."

Representative:

"Thank you! By the way, may I ask how you heard about us?"

*******IMPORTANT READ BELOW***********



TO APPLY:
